tasks.title: Interactive Crowd Voting
tasks.description: Allow spectators (or simulated crowd mechanics) to vote on events, such as which hazard spawns next or which player gets a buff during sudden death, making the arena feel more dynamic and engaged.

tasks.title: Black Hole Hazards
tasks.description: Hazards that exert a gravitational pull on all balls within a certain radius, sucking them in towards a central point that damages them.

tasks.title: Jump Pads
tasks.description: A new interactive tile type where stepping on it makes the ball invincible and untargetable for a short duration while it "flies" to a designated landing zone.

tasks.title: Debuff Cleansing Power-ups
tasks.description: Add a new power-up item that instantly cleanses all negative status effects (including the new max HP debuff, burn, and poison) and grants temporary immunity, providing a strategic counterplay option against heavy debuff-focused teams or zones.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zones with Multi-Buffs
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic safe zones that not only protect from environmental damage but also apply randomized buffs (like increased speed or damage) for a short duration, encouraging players to fight for the optimal spot inside the zone.

tasks.title: Decoy Illusion Traps
tasks.description: Add a new trap type that creates a holographic duplicate of a booster or healing spring. When a ball touches it, the hologram explodes, dealing damage and applying a 'stunned/confused' debuff.

tasks.title: Conveyor Belt Mechanics
tasks.description: Introduce directional conveyor belts on some arenas that continuously push balls, items, and hazards in a specific direction, creating dynamic zones and testing positional control algorithms.

tasks.title: Chain Dash Skill
tasks.description: A variant of dash where if an enemy is killed during the dash, the cooldown is instantly reset.

tasks.title: Stamina Pool Modifier
tasks.description: A game mode modifier where stamina regenerates twice as fast, allowing more frequent use of stamina-based skills.

tasks.title: Magnetic Boots Item
tasks.description: An item that temporarily increases a ball's friction and weight, making them immune to external displacement forces like wind, earthquakes, and gravity wells, at the cost of reduced movement speed.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Modifier
tasks.description: A new weather event or arena modifier where any damage dealt to an entity has a chance to chain to nearby entities within a small radius, encouraging players to maintain spatial separation.

tasks.title: Weather Predictor Drone
tasks.description: A deployable item that scans the sky and warns the team 10 seconds before a weather change happens.

tasks.title: Wind glider Wings
tasks.description: A cosmetic/loadout item that increases speed and jump distance specifically when the windstorm weather is active.

tasks.title: Energy Vampire Skill
tasks.description: A targeted skill that steals 30 stamina from an opponent and gives it to the user. Opponent is briefly slowed, and the user gets a brief speed burst from over-capped stamina.

tasks.title: Adrenaline Rush Mode
tasks.description: A new gamemode where maximum stamina dictates base speed. Everyone starts with 200 max stamina but taking damage permanently reduces maximum stamina for the rest of the round.

tasks.title: Low Gravity Anomaly Zone
tasks.description: Periodically, an anomaly zone spawns in the arena. Any balls entering it have their gravity removed (massively reduced friction) and bounce wildly off each other and walls with high elasticity. This causes unpredictable trajectories and forces players to rely purely on momentum or long-range attacks to score kills.

tasks.title: Sudden Death Meteor Shower
tasks.description: During the final 30 seconds of a match or when only two teams remain, a meteor shower begins hitting random spots on the arena. Each meteor deals massive AoE damage and leaves a temporary crater (impassable terrain) that alters movement paths and restricts dodging space.

tasks.title: Weather-Specific Ball Types
tasks.description: Introduce new ball types that specifically excel in certain weather conditions. For example, a 'Snow Yeti' ball that ignores perception reduction during snow and gains movement speed on icy surfaces, or a 'Sand Elemental' that can cloak entirely during sandstorms.

tasks.title: Wall bounce mechanic
tasks.description: Balls that get knocked back into a wall take additional damage based on their velocity.

tasks.title: Eclipse Random Event
tasks.description: A rare procedural event where an eclipse occurs regardless of the current phase in DayNightArena. During the eclipse, ALL balls lose their perception radius down to an extreme minimum (like 20 units) and global damage across the board is doubled, leading to chaotic close-quarter ambushes.

tasks.title: Stamina overload
tasks.description: If a ball picks up a stamina booster while already at max stamina, they get a temporary speed boost.

tasks.title: Gravitational Slingshot Hazard
tasks.description: Hazards that capture balls and rapidly accelerate them in an orbit before ejecting them at a high speed in a random direction.

tasks.title: Stealth Grass Hazmat Zones
tasks.description: Introduce patches of tall grass into the procedural arena where balls become temporarily invisible to AI opponents (reducing their perception radius/threat level to 0), but take a minor constant damage over time. This creates a tradeoff between stealth and health.

tasks.title: Reflective Energy Shields
tasks.description: A new skill where a ball can activate an energy shield that doesn't just absorb damage, but reflects 50% of the incoming damage back to the attacker as a projectile for 3 seconds. Adds a skill-testing timing element against high burst-damage enemies.

tasks.title: Weather Predictor Item
tasks.description: An equippable module or booster that reveals the next weather event and its duration before it happens, giving players a strategic advantage to position themselves safely.

tasks.title: Decoy Explosion Fragmentation
tasks.description: When a Trickster decoy explodes, it sends out visual fragmentation projectiles that can bounce off walls. They deal no damage but cause temporary slow/stuttering and apply minor visual noise.

tasks.title: Time Loop Ability
tasks.description: Create a rare, high-cost active ability for a specific ball type (like the Trickster or a new Time Mage) that allows the ball to instantly return to its location, health, and status from 3 seconds ago.

tasks.title: Decoy Mirror Positions
tasks.description: Trickster's 'deploy_decoy' skill now creates two decoys simultaneously that symmetrically orbit the caster or mirror the caster's movements, making it significantly harder for the AI to track the real Trickster.

tasks.title: Dynamic Map Hazards Mode
tasks.description: Introduce a game mode where map hazards, such as spikes, fire, and ice traps, dynamically spawn, move, or change severity as the match progresses, forcing players to adapt not just to the safe zone but also to the ever-changing terrain.

tasks.title: Thunderstorm Conductivity
tasks.description: During thunderstorms, metal-based or highly armored balls attract lightning strikes more frequently but gain a temporary speed boost or electric aura when hit.

tasks.title: Black Hole Hazard
tasks.description: A rare procedural arena event that spawns a massive black hole in the center of the map. It gradually pulls all entities and items towards its center while constantly shrinking the safe zone.

tasks.title: Reverse Time Ultimate
tasks.description: A support ultimate skill that records the positions, health, and statuses of all teammates over the last 3 seconds. When activated, it reverts all allies back to their state from 3 seconds ago, healing recent damage and placing them in a potentially better tactical position.

tasks.title: Decoy Ball Mechanic
tasks.description: Introduce a deployable 'Decoy' that mimics the player's current ball type and health. AI enemies will occasionally lock onto the decoy if they fail a perception check, absorbing damage while giving the player an opportunity to escape or ambush.

tasks.title: Magnetic Boots Cosmetic Modifier
tasks.description: A cosmetic modifier 'Magnetic Boots' that reduces push-back from explosions and hazards by 50% but slightly reduces base movement speed, adding trade-offs to the loadout system.

tasks.title: Class Evolution Paths on Level Up
tasks.description: Expand the mid-match level-up system so that at specific milestone levels (e.g., Level 5 and 10), balls can choose a subclass evolution (e.g., a Warrior evolving into a Paladin or Berserker), changing their abilities dynamically.

tasks.title: Aura Field Resonator
tasks.description: A rare map item that, when picked up, drastically increases the aura radius and doubles the effects of the stacking aura for the team for 15 seconds. It encourages teams to contest specific areas of the map and rewards well-coordinated groups that can utilize the buff effectively.

tasks.title: Aura Disruption Ability
tasks.description: Introduce a new ability or item that disrupts enemy auras for a short duration. Balls caught in the disruption zone lose their stacking aura buffs and their aura radius is reduced to zero, making them temporarily vulnerable. This adds a counter-play mechanism to the stacking aura strategy.

tasks.title: Cosmetic Auras Based on Level
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic cosmetic auras for balls during a match that grow in intensity or change color as they level up, offering a visual indicator of a ball's strength and threat level to both players and AI.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Trap
tasks.description: A trap that, upon activation, zaps the triggering ball and then jumps to the nearest enemy ball within a short radius, losing a bit of damage with each jump. It would encourage enemies to spread out and punish grouping up.

tasks.title: Prestige Mastery Milestones
tasks.description: Enhance the prestige system by granting exclusive titles, visual auras, and a custom ball type skin for every milestone (e.g., Prestige 5, Prestige 10). It incentivizes long-term engagement and lets veteran players flex their progress visually in the lobby.

tasks.title: Daily Challenge Modifier Mode
tasks.description: Introduce a new game mode that randomly applies extreme global mutators daily (e.g., 'Low Gravity + Double Damage' or 'Invisible Hazards'). Players who participate and survive receive exclusive cosmetic rewards and bonus skill points, creating an ever-changing meta.

tasks.title: Mirror Image Decoy Movement
tasks.description: Instead of the decoy remaining completely static, it could perfectly mirror the Trickster's movements in the opposite direction. This would drastically increase confusion for opponents, as they would have to quickly figure out which movement pattern represents the real player trying to engage or flee.

tasks.title: Minion Evolution Mechanic
tasks.description: Introduce an evolution mechanic for minions created by the Necromancer. If a minion survives for more than 30 seconds or scores a killing blow, it transforms into an 'Elite Minion' with increased health, attack power, and an autonomous ranged attack.

tasks.title: Decoy Detonation
tasks.description: Allow the Trickster to manually detonate their active decoy by holding down the skill button or activating it a third time. The explosion could deal minor area-of-effect damage or briefly blind enemies within a short radius, giving the Trickster a mix of mobility and trap-setting capability.

tasks.title: EMP Trap
tasks.description: A deployable trap that disables enemy perception radius for a short duration.

tasks.title: Decoy Clone Ability
tasks.description: A new skill where a ball creates a 1 HP holographic clone of itself that runs in the opposite direction, forcing enemies to waste attacks and cooldowns on the fake target.

tasks.title: Necromancer Minion Sacrifice Skill
tasks.description: Add a new active skill for the Necromancer ball called 'Corpse Explosion' where it can selectively sacrifice one of its active minions to deal significant area-of-effect damage to nearby enemies, while also temporarily applying a slow debuff to survivors caught in the blast radius.

tasks.title: Nemesis Tracker Item
tasks.description: A new active item that provides a temporary compass or minimap indicator pointing directly to the nearest Nemesis, allowing players to hunt them down.

tasks.title: Black Market Mode
tasks.description: Players start with basic stats and abilities, but collect currency scattered across the map to buy temporary or permanent upgrades from wandering Black Market nodes during the match. These nodes act like dynamic modifier zones, but require payment, making currency collection a key strategic objective.

tasks.title: Clone Detonation Mode
tasks.description: Similar to Clone Chaos, but when a clone's HP drops to 0, it explodes dealing small area-of-effect damage. Players must navigate carefully to avoid triggering a chain reaction of exploding clones.

tasks.title: Ice Storm Weather Event
tasks.description: Periodically spawns a blizzard that severely reduces all ball movement speed (friction increases) and creates temporary slippery ice patches as hazards that cause balls to slide uncontrollably.

tasks.title: New Gamemode: The Floor is Lava
tasks.description: In this mode, the entire arena floor slowly turns into lava starting from the edges. Safe zones are randomly generated platforms that appear for a limited time before submerging. Players must navigate between platforms using bounce pads and careful movement.

tasks.title: New Hazard: Ice Patch
tasks.description: Ice patches spawn randomly. When balls enter them, friction is reduced to nearly 0, causing them to slide uncontrollably until they hit a wall or exit the patch. Damage taken while on ice is slightly reduced, but they are vulnerable to environmental hazards if they slide into them.

tasks.title: Lightning Storm Overload
tasks.description: During thunderstorms, lightning strikes not only deal damage but also supercharge robotic/metal ball types, granting them temporary speed and damage buffs at the cost of slow health drain.

tasks.title: Time Loop Game Mode
tasks.description: Every 30 seconds, the game state rewinds 5 seconds in time. Balls keep their current momentum but revert to their previous positions and HP, requiring players to plan actions knowing a rewind is imminent.

tasks.title: Mud Terrain in Rain
tasks.description: Rainy weather creates temporary mud patches in dirt/sand arenas, slowing down movement speed of all units except those with a 'swamp' or 'water' trait.

tasks.title: Magnetic Fields Game Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where invisible magnetic fields pull or push balls depending on their assigned polarities. Every 10 seconds, polarities randomly flip, causing sudden tactical shifts and chaotic collisions.

tasks.title: Portal Gun Item
tasks.description: Introduce a rare 'Portal Gun' item that allows a player to shoot two linked portals onto the arena walls. Players can use these custom portals to quickly traverse the map, escape dangerous situations, or teleport projectiles to surprise enemies.

tasks.title: Portal Collapse Event
tasks.description: A new weather/arena event where unstable portals spawn randomly across the map. These portals occasionally collapse, releasing a shockwave that damages and knocks back nearby players, creating a dynamic and risky environment.

tasks.title: Season Catch-up Mechanics
tasks.description: Introduce a 'Catch-up' multiplier that slightly increases the rate at which prestige or EXP is earned for players who join a season late (e.g., in the final week of a 30-day season). This helps new or returning players compete for the top 100 spots without feeling discouraged by an early insurmountable lead by others.

tasks.title: Season-Themed Dynamic Arenas
tasks.description: During specific seasons, the procedural arena generation includes seasonal hazards or aesthetics. For example, during a 'Winter' season, the arena could generate slippery ice patches and snowman decoys, while a 'Summer' season could feature sun-flare hazards and sand-trap zones. This would keep the gameplay visually and mechanically fresh.

tasks.title: Weather effect: Sandstorm
tasks.description: A new weather event 'Sandstorm' where movement speed is reduced for all balls, and vision is obscured unless they are near a 'shelter' hazard or within a flare's radius. Sandstorm could deal minor damage over time to non-earth elemental classes.

tasks.title: New 'Decoy' active skill for Trickster class
tasks.description: Add a skill for the Trickster class that drops a fake booster (like a decoy) which acts as a hazard to enemies. When an enemy tries to collect it, it explodes and deals damage, while also pushing them back. This would add more strategy and mind games to the combat.

tasks.title: Bumper Shield Item
tasks.description: An active item that gives the ball a temporary bumper aura. Any enemy that touches them is bumped away with high speed, similar to the stationary bumper hazard.

tasks.title: Acid Rain Weather
tasks.description: Rain that causes small DoT effect.

tasks.title: Pinball Game Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where the arena is mostly filled with bumpers, bounce pads, and flippers. Balls deal reduced damage with basic attacks, but slamming an enemy into a hazard deals massive bonus damage.

tasks.title: Meteor Shower Mode
tasks.description: High damage hazards fall from the sky.

tasks.title: Status Transfer Boomerang
tasks.description: An active item that absorbs the current status effects (stun, silence, dot) of the user and can be thrown at an enemy to inflict all those absorbed status effects at once.

tasks.title: Idea 1: Ice Patches
tasks.description: Hazards that remove friction, causing balls to slide continuously and bounce off walls faster.

tasks.title: Idea 2: EMP Mine
tasks.description: A hidden mine that detonates on proximity, disabling AI abilities and rendering them unable to attack for 5 seconds.

tasks.title: Clone Illusion Switch
tasks.description: Players can manually swap positions with one of their static clones using a sub-skill, allowing for advanced deception and sudden repositioning.

tasks.title: Chain Reaction Clones
tasks.description: When a clone mine explodes, it causes any other friendly clones within its blast radius to also explode after a short delay, creating a cascading field of destruction.

tasks.title: Dynamic Season Backgrounds
tasks.description: The main menu background changes visually depending on the current season theme (e.g. fiery for Inferno, snowy for Frost).

tasks.title: Custom Season Badges
tasks.description: Players can equip a custom badge next to their name corresponding to the highest season rank they achieved.

tasks.title: EMP Shield Item
tasks.description: A new equippable item or booster that temporarily grants immunity to EMP bursts and other scrambling effects.

tasks.title: Add Chain Lightning Visual Arcs
tasks.description: Render bezier curve lightning arcs between hit entities during chain bounces.

tasks.title: Hack-O-Bot Hazard
tasks.description: A mobile robotic hazard that seeks out players and attempts to attach itself to them, periodically scrambled their targeting until destroyed.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Stun Effect
tasks.description: Apply a micro-stun (0.2s) to entities hit by chain lightning.

tasks.title: Community Loadout Leaderboards
tasks.description: Create a new leaderboard category that tracks the win rates and popularity of shared loadout codes. Players could browse the top performing loadouts each week and quickly import them into their profile to try them out in Battle Royale mode.

tasks.title: Loadout Code Fragments (Collectibles)
tasks.description: Introduce scattered fragments of 'ancient' loadout codes hidden within procedurally generated arenas as rare items. If a player collects all fragments of a code during a match, they permanently unlock a special cosmetic or hidden ball type associated with that unique loadout code.

tasks.title: Dynamic Map Hazards Based on Weather
tasks.description: Expand the weather chaos mode by introducing dynamic map elements that change based on weather. For example, rain can create mud puddles that slow players, snow can freeze certain areas causing sliding, and heatwaves can create localized fire zones that deal damage.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe-Zone Mechanics
tasks.description: Introduce a game mode feature where the safe playable area gradually shrinks over time, applying damage-over-time (DoT) to any ball caught outside it, heavily discouraging camping.

tasks.title: Quantum Swap Trap
tasks.description: A rare hazard that, when stepped on by a ball, instantly swaps the positions of that ball and a randomly chosen enemy, creating sudden ambushes or miraculous escapes.

tasks.title: Autumn Arena with leaves
tasks.description: Autumn arena obscures vision

tasks.title: Spring Arena with high winds
tasks.description: Spring arena pushes players around

tasks.title: Wormhole Links
tasks.description: Gravity wells can randomly pair up to act as wormholes. When a player falls into one, they are instantly teleported and launched out of its pair, taking a small amount of temporal damage.

tasks.title: Decoy Placement Trap
tasks.description: A new trap type that spawns a stationary decoy of the player when triggered by an enemy. The decoy distracts AI opponents, drawing their aggro while the true player gets a window to escape or counter-attack.

tasks.title: Reverse Gravity Pulse
tasks.description: Periodically, gravity wells invert their pull and push entities outward with extreme force, adding a layer of unpredictability to the Gravity Well mode and creating new mobility options.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Relic
tasks.description: A consumable item that, upon use, strikes the nearest enemy with a lightning bolt that bounces to up to 3 additional nearby enemies, dealing decreasing damage with each jump. Useful for breaking up grouped opponents.

tasks.title: Mirror Image Ultimate
tasks.description: Introduce a new ball class (Illusionist) whose ultimate skill spawns multiple decoys that actively mimic the player's inputs (movement and basic attacks) but deal reduced damage.

tasks.title: Wall Ricochet Trajectory Indicators
tasks.description: Add visual trajectory lines for chain lightning before it casts, showing the player the expected bounce path across entities, hazards, and walls to allow for tactical positioning.

tasks.title: Decoy Enhancement Module
tasks.description: Allow 'decoy_item' pickups to optionally explode upon expiring or being destroyed, dealing minor area-of-effect damage or blinding nearby enemies to provide greater utility and zoning.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Overload Mod
tasks.description: Introduce an overload mechanic where chain lightning bounces exceeding a certain jump threshold detonate the final target in a small AoE blast, dealing explosive damage but putting the skill on an extended cooldown.

tasks.title: Neon Disco Mode
tasks.description: A mode where floor panels light up with music rhythm, buffing or debuffing entities based on timing.

tasks.title: Gravity Swap
tasks.description: The arena periodically reverses the polarity of the center, pushing balls out and pulling hazards in.

tasks.title: Weekend Multiplier Event
tasks.description: Introduce weekend events where daily login streak rewards and skill point gains from matches are temporarily multiplied, encouraging weekend activity.

tasks.title: Chain Reaction Traps
tasks.description: Introduce a new type of hazard called Chain Reaction Traps. When one trap is triggered by a ball, it sends out a shockwave that activates all other traps within a certain radius. This creates a domino effect that can quickly engulf a large portion of the arena in damage or debuffs, requiring players to carefully navigate around clusters of traps.

tasks.title: Kamikaze Clones
tasks.description: An upgraded version of the mimic clone that, instead of vanishing upon expiring, aggressively charges at the nearest enemy and detonates for a small amount of damage.

tasks.title: Magnetic Polarity System
tasks.description: Implement a Magnetic Polarity system where each ball is randomly assigned a positive or negative charge at the start of the match. Balls with opposite charges are slowly pulled towards each other, while balls with the same charge are slightly repelled. The polarity could flip periodically throughout the match, forcing AI to adapt their movement and positioning dynamically.

tasks.title: Skill Re-activation (Teleport to Mimic)
tasks.description: When a ball has an active mimic clone on the field, casting the skill again could instantly swap the positions of the owner and the clone, allowing for advanced juking and escape mechanics.

tasks.title: Sinkholes as base modifiers
tasks.description: Sinkholes can now expand over time, slowly consuming nearby hazards. If a sinkhole merges with a quicksand hazard, it becomes a massive sinkhole with a stronger pull and slower speed debuff.

tasks.title: Bumper enhancements
tasks.description: Bumpers can now bounce players significantly further, granting a temporary movement speed boost upon landing to reward players for precise positioning.

tasks.title: Sunlight Beam Hazard
tasks.description: During the day cycle, rare but highly damaging 'sunlight beams' can focus randomly on the arena, rapidly depleting HP of balls lacking daylight buffs (like vampires, assassins, or phantoms), forcing them to seek cover behind indestructible walls.

tasks.title: Lunar Eclipse Event
tasks.description: A rare 'Lunar Eclipse' event that occurs for a brief duration, simultaneously triggering both night time buffs and day time buffs across all classes while completely disabling perception limits, leading to chaotic full-arena fights.

tasks.title: Random Boss Invasions during Late Game
tasks.description: If a match extends beyond a certain time limit, a massive, unkillable Boss entity spawns at the center of the arena. It slowly expands an instant-kill zone or shoots devastating projectiles in random directions. This would force remaining balls to scramble, breaking defensive stalemates and creating high-stakes, chaotic finales.

tasks.title: Cursed Relic Modifier Zones
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic zones on the map that grant massive buffs (like +200% speed or +150% damage) but come with severe curses (e.g., losing 5% HP per second or inverted steering). Players who intentionally enter these zones could make clutch plays if they manage the risk correctly, adding strategic depth to positional gameplay.

tasks.title: Shield Generator Drone
tasks.description: A new drone variant that follows allies and projects a localized shield, absorbing incoming damage until its energy is depleted or it is destroyed by enemies.

tasks.title: Empowerment Matrix Trap
tasks.description: A new hazard/trap that acts as a zone of empowerment. Allies stepping into the matrix receive temporary boosts to speed and damage, while enemies suffer a slow effect.

tasks.title: Chain Reflect Damage
tasks.description: Reflected damage has a chance to chain to a nearby enemy, creating a 'bouncing' reflect effect that punishes grouped enemies when hitting a shielded target.

tasks.title: Reflect Shield Upgrades in Shop
tasks.description: Allow players to upgrade the max capacity of the reflect shield or its active duration via the prestige shop to increase survivability against burst damage.

tasks.title: Quantum Swap Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard that triggers a positional swap between two random balls when activated, causing disorientation and opening up new strategic attacks or sudden escapes.

tasks.title: Leech Seed Booster
tasks.description: A booster that allows the collecting ball's attacks to plant a leech seed on the target, draining HP over time and transferring it back to the attacker.

tasks.title: Black Hole Final Phase
tasks.description: If a match extends beyond normal limits, spawn a massive slowly growing black hole in the center that pulls all balls inward, creating an intense final showdown.

tasks.title: Black Hole Generator Hazard
tasks.description: A new procedural hazard that pulls nearby balls towards its center, slowing them down and dealing damage over time.

tasks.title: Wall-Jump Skill
tasks.description: Allow specific ball types to bounce off walls with increased velocity to perform surprise attacks.

tasks.title: Guild Raid Bosses
tasks.description: Introduce a PvE mode where guild members team up to fight massive boss balls with unique mechanics. Damage dealt by all guild members over a week is combined to defeat the boss and earn exclusive guild cosmetics.

tasks.title: Ball Loadouts / Perk System
tasks.description: Before entering a battle royale, balls can select two perks (e.g., 'Thick Skinned' for +10% HP, 'Nimble' for +10% Speed). This allows players to further customize the existing ball classes (like making a tankier scout or a faster elementalist).

tasks.title: Guild Headquarters Customization
tasks.description: Allow guilds to spend resources on customizing a virtual headquarters. Members can view their customized HQ, which can feature unlocked statues, banners, and an interactive training arena for testing new loadouts.

tasks.title: Interactive Crowd Booing / Cheering
tasks.description: Crowd system in the arena actively reacts to ball actions. If a ball camps too long or hides, the crowd boos, and they might throw minor hazards (like small debris) into the arena to force the player out. Conversely, epic plays (multikills) trigger cheers and small beneficial drops.

tasks.title: Gravity Boots Booster
tasks.description: A booster that gives the player immunity to pulling effects and quicksand.

tasks.title: Black Hole Trap
tasks.description: A trap that slowly pulls players in before exploding.

tasks.title: Decoy Explosion Shrapnel
tasks.description: When a fake booster explodes, it should shoot out smaller shrapnel hazards in random directions that linger for 5 seconds and deal minor damage over time to anyone who touches them.

tasks.title: Elemental Shield Powerup
tasks.description: A new booster that grants temporary immunity to all environmental hazard damage (lava, spikes) but does not protect from ball attacks.

tasks.title: Ice Slippage Modifier
tasks.description: Add an 'ice_patches' hazard type that drastically lowers friction for any ball caught in it, causing their movement/velocity commands to slide uncontrollably until they exit the patch.

tasks.title: Booster Scrambler Trap
tasks.description: A new trap type that does not deal damage, but upon collection, it shuffles the player's active skill and inventory with a random nearby player for 10 seconds.

tasks.title: Black Hole Collapse Event
tasks.description: When the safe zone radius becomes very small, black holes start spawning and slowly merging, pulling players towards the center.

tasks.title: Rolling Boulders Event
tasks.description: Periodically spawn massive boulders that roll linearly across the arena, crushing balls in their path and interacting physically with walls and other hazards before shattering into smaller rock hazards.

tasks.title: Bumper Chains
tasks.description: Allow bumpers to link to one another creating long chains that sweep across the arena, functioning as a moving wall.

tasks.title: Day/Night specific bosses
tasks.description: Spawn nocturnal bosses only at night and diurnal bosses during the day.

tasks.title: Bumper Explosions
tasks.description: Bumpers could detonate on impact if a ball has enough velocity when striking them, damaging nearby players.

tasks.title: Bouncy Terrain Mutator
tasks.description: Add a new mutator or game mode 'Bouncy Terrain' where collision with the arena walls or certain hazards doesn't stop or damage the ball, but reflects their velocity dramatically (like a pinball bumper), increasing chaos and requiring balls to adapt their pathfinding.

tasks.title: Chain Reaction Explosives
tasks.description: Introduce a new arena hazard 'volatile_barrel' that explodes when taking damage. If multiple barrels are near each other, one explosion triggers the others, creating a massive chain reaction that can wipe out grouped enemies or be tactically detonated by sniper balls.

tasks.title: Portal Overload Event
tasks.description: A random arena event where existing portals become unstable. Instead of teleporting players instantly, entering a portal triggers a 2-second 'charging' phase where nearby players (friend or foe) are sucked in. Once charged, all sucked-in players are blasted out of the exit portal at high speeds in random directions.

tasks.title: Blacksmith NPC
tasks.description: A neutral NPC that wanders the arena and can upgrade your crafted artifacts if you protect them from hazards for 30 seconds.

tasks.title: Material Magnet Booster
tasks.description: A temporary power-up that pulls all dropped materials within a 500-radius towards the player for 10 seconds, helping safe collection in danger zones.

tasks.title: Black Hole Collapse Mechanic
tasks.description: Black holes now collapse into massive explosions after a certain amount of time, sending everything they sucked in flying outward and dealing immense damage to nearby entities.

tasks.title: Mirror Coat Shield
tasks.description: A new active skill that reflects all projectiles and hazard effects back to their source for a short duration, but lowers movement speed by 50% while active.

tasks.title: Weapon Attachments
tasks.description: Add drops for weapon attachments like silencers (reduces visibility on map), extended mags, or modified scopes that augment base abilities temporarily.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zones
tasks.description: Introduce a shrinking safe zone mechanic over time, forcing players towards the center of the arena. Taking damage when outside the zone increases as the zone shrinks.

tasks.title: Guild Perks Tree
tasks.description: Expand the guild system to include a progression tree where the guild master can spend 'Guild XP' earned from GvG matches to unlock permanent passive bonuses for all members (e.g. +5% HP, +10% move speed).

tasks.title: Black Hole Gravity Anomaly Hazard
tasks.description: Introduce a rare Black Hole hazard that appears periodically in the center of the arena. It slowly pulls all balls towards it. Balls that get too close take heavy continuous damage, but skilled players can use the black hole's gravitational pull to slingshot themselves at high speeds toward enemies or objectives.

tasks.title: Bounty Contracts
tasks.description: Allow guilds to place bounties on other guilds. When a bounty is placed, members of the opposing guild are highlighted on the map and yield double points/rewards when eliminated during a match.

tasks.title: Quantum Teleporter Nodes
tasks.description: Place quantum teleporter nodes around the map. Entering one node instantly teleports a ball to a paired node on the other side of the arena. This creates high-risk, high-reward escape routes or flanking paths, but teleporters have a brief cooldown and leave a visual trail revealing the destination.

tasks.title: Cursed Bumpers
tasks.description: Some bumpers provide a massive immediate boost to speed and damage, but apply a slow damage-over-time or stamina drain effect that lasts until the ball hits a normal bumper.

tasks.title: Bumper Chaining
tasks.description: If a ball hits multiple bumpers in a row without hitting a wall or using stamina, the bumper powerups are multiplied or enhanced, encouraging skilled pinball-style navigation.

tasks.title: Weather Predictor Booster
tasks.description: A new booster that spawns occasionally. Collecting it gives the player a 10-second warning before the weather changes and grants them temporary immunity to negative weather effects (like slow movement in mud/snow or lightning strikes in thunderstorms) for the first 15 seconds of the new weather phase.

tasks.title: Interactive Puddles and Ice Patches
tasks.description: Dynamically generate interactive puddles during rain that eventually turn into ice patches if the weather switches to snow. Puddles reduce steering and increase dash distance, while ice patches cause a brief slide without any directional control.

tasks.title: Shrinking Walls of Fire
tasks.description: The edges of the arena slowly burn inwards. Any player touching the flaming boundary takes massive continuous damage. The safe zone shrinks down to a tiny dot by the end of the match.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Mode
tasks.description: Every player is randomly paired with another player in the arena. If one takes damage or gets a status effect, the other gets it too, regardless of distance.

tasks.title: Mirror Dimension Arena
tasks.description: A new arena that spawns permanent mirror clones on the exact opposite side of the map for every player, tracking their movement inversely.

tasks.title: Decoy Mine
tasks.description: A decoy clone that acts like the mimic clone but instead of just expiring or dying, it explodes and deals massive area of effect damage when it absorbs enough damage.

tasks.title: Reverse Controls Mutator
tasks.description: A mutator for custom matches where all movement inputs and AI logic for movement direction are periodically reversed for 5 seconds.

tasks.title: Clan Wars Game Mode
tasks.description: A new game mode where two clans face off against each other in a multi-round tournament. Winning yields special clan cosmetics and bonus clan points for the leaderboard.

tasks.title: Stormcaller Booster
tasks.description: A rare booster that upon collection surrounds the player with a mini lightning storm for 10 seconds. It grants a speed boost and periodically strikes nearby hazards or enemies to clear a path.

tasks.title: Clan Vault
tasks.description: A shared storage space where clan members can deposit and withdraw crafting materials or unwanted items, with rank-based access controls.

tasks.title: Black Hole Generator Item
tasks.description: An active item that allows players to deploy a miniature black hole. The black hole slowly pulls nearby enemies towards its center and deals continuous damage while they remain within its event horizon. This adds area-denial capabilities and creates opportunities for combo attacks when enemies are grouped up.

tasks.title: Quantum Mirror Shield
tasks.description: A defensive item that creates a temporary energy shield around the ball. While active, any projectiles or ranged attacks that hit the shield are reflected back towards the attacker with increased velocity, rewarding precise timing and punishing predictable ranged spam.

tasks.title: Reverse Controls Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where all movement inputs for players (and AI logic calculations) are reversed, making movement completely counter-intuitive.

tasks.title: Ping Pong Mode
tasks.description: A game mode with indestructible paddles at the edges of the arena that periodically sweep across, bouncing all players at high speeds.

tasks.title: Day/Night Cyclic Global Vision Modifiers
tasks.description: Introduce global visibility shifts to all game modes by making it progressively darker during a night phase, reducing 'perception_radius' dynamically across all AI balls, except those carrying a 'Lantern' cosmetic or light-source booster. This allows ambush tactics at night.

tasks.title: Season-Based Boss Spawns
tasks.description: Introduce a random boss entity (like 'Yeti' in Winter season or 'Sandworm' in Desert season) that spawns in the center of the arena during the final zone closure, forcing players to either defeat the boss for massive points or use it to grief opponents.

tasks.title: Decoy Overload Trap
tasks.description: When a decoy explodes, it pulls in all enemies within a small radius before applying the poison cloud, ensuring the damage over time is harder to escape.

tasks.title: Exploding Dummy Re-Arming
tasks.description: Players can pick up a 'Re-Arm' token to instantly reset their decoy skill cooldown and boost the explosion damage by 25% for their next deployment.

tasks.title: Energy Shields
tasks.description: Placeable energy shields that block projectiles and vision but allow allies to pass through.

tasks.title: Tag Team Mode
tasks.description: A new game mode where players queue as a team of two balls but only one is active at a time. The active ball can swap with their teammate using a tag mechanism, which could have a cooldown or require returning to a specific zone. This allows for strategic combinations of different ball types and requires careful management of both balls' health.

tasks.title: Reverse Safe Zone
tasks.description: A game mode where the safe zone expands outward from the center, and the center becomes dangerous. It forces players to move towards the edges of the map as the game progresses, completely changing standard battle royale dynamics.

tasks.title: Daily Quests
tasks.description: Introduce daily quests to encourage players to log in every day. Quests could include tasks like 'Deal 10,000 damage', 'Survive for 5 minutes', or 'Play 3 matches in the current weekly mutator mode'. Completing quests would reward players with experience, currency, or cosmetic items.

tasks.title: Shrinking Labyrinth
tasks.description: Combine the shifting maze with the shrinking safe zone. Walls dynamically shift and crush players while the safe area gets smaller, forcing players to quickly navigate dead ends before the storm catches them.

tasks.title: Laser Tripwire Trap
tasks.description: A deployable skill that sets a laser tripwire between two points. Enemies crossing the tripwire take heavy damage and are briefly stunned.

tasks.title: Reflective Shield
tasks.description: A defensive skill that grants a temporary shield reflecting incoming damage back to attackers for a short duration.

tasks.title: Decoy Trap Items
tasks.description: Introduce items that look like boosters on the map but explode or apply debuffs when a player collects them.

tasks.title: Turret Deployment
tasks.description: Allow players to deploy temporary turrets that shoot nearby enemies autonomously.

tasks.title: Laser Fence Hazards
tasks.description: Add placeable laser fences that link together between nodes. Passing through the laser deals high damage and applies a short slow effect, encouraging positional counterplay.

tasks.title: Grappling Hook Environmental Traversal
tasks.description: Expand the magnet tether mechanic into an environmental grappling hook, allowing players to hook onto walls or specific nodes to swing across hazards quickly.

tasks.title: Black Hole Ultimate
tasks.description: A new ball type that can summon a slow-moving black hole, pulling in nearby balls and hazards, dealing heavy damage over time.

tasks.title: Rubber Band Bonds
tasks.description: Teams of balls are tethered together by invisible rubber bands. If they move too far apart, they are snapped back together with massive force, dealing damage to anything in their path.

tasks.title: Reverse Friction Mode
tasks.description: Balls continuously accelerate as long as they are moving, turning the arena into a high-speed ping-pong match. Collisions deal extra damage based on speed.

tasks.title: Gravity Inversion Modifier
tasks.description: A random arena event that periodically reverses gravity, sending all balls bouncing towards the center instead of outwards.

tasks.title: Reflective Shields
tasks.description: An activated ability or item that gives players a temporary reflective shield. Any projectile or targeted hazard damage during this window reflects half of the damage back to the attacker.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zone based on Player Proximity
tasks.description: Instead of purely time-based shrinking, the safe zone shrinks faster if multiple players are camping inside it, forcing them to fight or move out.

tasks.title: Dynamic Temperature System
tasks.description: Expand the weather logic to include a persistent 'temperature' variable for the arena, which determines how long ice slicks last or how quickly mud dries into solid ground. Characters with certain abilities (like fireball) could dynamically melt ice patches into puddles of water, creating interesting environmental interactions.

tasks.title: Weather-Adaptive Cosmetics
tasks.description: Give balls visual upgrades that provide functional benefits based on the weather, such as snowshoes that negate the slippery effect on ice slicks or spiked tires that help them navigate mud pits without being slowed down as severely. These could be found as temporary power-ups.

tasks.title: Decoy Illusionists
tasks.description: A new ball type that can create up to 3 different types of decoys simultaneously - one that explodes, one that stuns, and one that heals nearby allies when it is destroyed.

tasks.title: Thunderstorm Modifier
tasks.description: Periodically, lightning strikes the arena. Balls caught in the blast radius are stunned for a short duration and take damage. A visual warning appears briefly before the strike.

tasks.title: Sonar Pulse Ability
tasks.description: A new AI ability that temporarily increases the ball's perception radius significantly, emitting a ping that reveals the location of nearby enemies and items, particularly useful in dark or low-visibility game modes.

tasks.title: Decoy Minefield Arena
tasks.description: A new game mode where the arena is randomly seeded with invisible decoys. Players must carefully navigate the map or use vision-revealing abilities to avoid setting off massive chain reactions.

tasks.title: Dynamic Arena Hazards
tasks.description: Hazards can change their size, shape, and damage dynamically during the game, based on arena-wide events and seasonal modifiers.

tasks.title: Interactive Weather System
tasks.description: Weather conditions in different seasonal arenas (like heatwaves, snowstorms, or heavy winds) actively affect ball movement speed, friction, and ability cooldowns.

tasks.title: Shrinking Nightmares
tasks.description: During dark phases in Battle Royale, shadow monsters spawn randomly outside players' vision. The monsters aggressively hunt down players and despawn when the dark phase ends. Surviving players gain a significant score boost.

tasks.title: Dynamic Arena Padding
tasks.description: Add an arena mutator or interactive element where parts of the boundary become 'Bouncy' (drastically increasing reflection speed) while other parts become 'Sticky' (catching and stopping balls), changing periodically during a match to keep players constantly aware of their positioning relative to the edges.

tasks.title: Wall Jump Ability
tasks.description: Introduce a new active skill for certain ball types (e.g., Ninja or Acrobat) that allows them to purposefully dash into an arena boundary to trigger an instant, high-speed 'Wall Jump' ricochet, dealing massive damage to any entity caught in the rebound path while briefly granting immunity.

tasks.title: Weather Mastery Mode
tasks.description: A new game mode where the arena dynamically cycles through extreme weather events every 15 seconds. Players must collect specific weather-resistant boosters to survive the changing environments, encouraging mobility and map control.

tasks.title: Mass Clone Skill
tasks.description: A rare skill or ultimate ability that creates a decoy clone for every ball currently in the arena to cause massive confusion during big fights.

tasks.title: Tornado Hazard Event
tasks.description: Periodically spawn a Tornado hazard that roams around the arena and pulls nearby balls toward it, dealing damage over time.

tasks.title: Clone Mine Trap
tasks.description: A hazard that triggers when a ball gets near, immediately spawning hostile clone enemies of that ball that target the original ball.

tasks.title: Obstacle Course Mode
tasks.description: A survival mode where players must navigate an increasingly difficult obstacle course filled with moving lasers, rotating bumpers, and collapsing floors.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Ability
tasks.description: Add a new ability that targets one enemy and bounces to nearby enemies, dealing reduced damage on each subsequent bounce.

tasks.title: Time Dilation Zone
tasks.description: An arena hazard or skill effect that creates a permanent slow-motion zone. Any entities entering the zone have their speed and cooldown reduction halved, while projectiles passing through it stay suspended for a set duration before resuming travel.

tasks.title: Dodgeball Mode
tasks.description: Balls are divided into two teams on opposite sides of a center line. Players cannot cross the line but can throw hazards and boosters.

tasks.title: Quantum Swap Skill
tasks.description: A skill where the ball immediately swaps places with a targeted ally or enemy, causing confusion and transferring any negative status effects (burn, poison) currently on the user to the swapped target.

tasks.title: Juggernaut Mode
tasks.description: Similar to Boss Fight, but when the Juggernaut is killed, the player who dealt the final blow becomes the new Juggernaut.

tasks.title: Trickster Fake Health Bar
tasks.description: Tricksters occasionally display a fake health bar to enemies making them look severely wounded, baiting them into a trap.

tasks.title: Alchemist Ball Type
tasks.description: Introduce a new Alchemist ball type that specifically benefits from poison and DoT mechanics. They gain a slight speed buff when inside a poison_cloud or poison_nova, and their basic attacks have a small chance to apply a very weak, stacking poison effect.

tasks.title: Shrinking Poison Gas Zone
tasks.description: Add a dynamic battle royale mechanic where the arena is gradually engulfed by a poison gas zone that moves randomly, forcing players closer together and introducing severe DoT damage outside the safe area.

tasks.title: Black Hole Collapse Mode
tasks.description: An arena mode where instead of a ring closing, a slow-moving black hole sweeps across the map sucking in anything in its path.

tasks.title: Weather Resistant Items
tasks.description: Boots or goggles that specifically negate the negative movement or vision debuffs applied by certain weather effects.

tasks.title: Tsunami Event
tasks.description: A weather event that acts as a hazard where a giant wave sweeps across the screen and moves all players to a certain side, causing damage if they hit walls.

tasks.title: Chrono Shift Skill
tasks.description: A new skill that allows balls to speed up time in a localized area around them for a few seconds, drastically increasing their movement and attack speed while moving outside enemies slowly.

tasks.title: Rewind Powerup
tasks.description: A rare collectible booster that temporarily stores a ball's position, health, and cooldown states, then instantly rewinds them 3 seconds into the past if their HP drops below zero.

tasks.title: Shield Generator Booster
tasks.description: A booster that gives the collecting ball a temporary shield that absorbs the next incoming instance of damage.

tasks.title: Teleporter Hub Arena
tasks.description: A specialized game mode or arena layout featuring a central teleporter hub that randomly connects to various peripheral zones, shifting its destinations every few seconds to create chaotic navigation challenges.

tasks.title: Necromancer Bone Armor
tasks.description: Necromancer periodically generates bone armor stacks that mitigate flat damage from incoming attacks.

tasks.title: Echo Booster
tasks.description: A new booster that deploys a decoy of the collecting ball that emits loud pings, revealing hidden enemies within a wide radius and causing them to briefly run away from the decoy in fear, creating crowd control opportunities.

tasks.title: Nemesis Tracking Aura
tasks.description: A passive skill that periodically reveals the location of your nemeses through walls, allowing you to track them down more easily.

tasks.title: Revenge Burst
tasks.description: An explosive ability that deals more damage the more nemeses you have alive on the field, giving a comeback mechanic.

tasks.title: Bouncy Castle Arena
tasks.description: The arena itself is made of bouncy material, making balls bounce with more force.

tasks.title: Weather Synergy Traps
tasks.description: Traps that react dynamically to current weather conditions, e.g., puddle traps becoming electrified during a thunderstorm or freezing during a blizzard to root enemies.

tasks.title: Meteor Swarm Event
tasks.description: A random game event where meteors crash into the arena, creating temporary hazardous craters and leaving behind rare materials when destroyed.

tasks.title: Weaponized Tether Mode
tasks.description: A new game mode where all balls are permanently tethered to another random ball in the arena. Moving in opposite directions drains stamina rapidly, while coordinated movements grant a temporary speed and damage buff. Eliminating an opponent breaks their tether, causing an explosive recoil that damages anyone nearby.

tasks.title: Grappling Hook Booster
tasks.description: A consumable booster that allows a ball to grapple onto another ball or the wall and pull themselves quickly towards it, giving them bursts of mobility.

tasks.title: Weather Anomaly: Solar Eclipse
tasks.description: A rare weather event that gradually darkens the entire arena, drastically reducing vision radius for all players except those with night vision. Causes some hazards to behave differently (e.g. solar panels stop providing power, shadow boosters spawn more frequently).

tasks.title: Gravity Well Trap
tasks.description: A placeable trap that, when triggered, creates a temporary miniature black hole that violently pulls nearby balls and items towards the center, ignoring collision lines. It doesn't deal damage itself but leaves players vulnerable to AoE attacks.

tasks.title: Bouncing Laser Hazards
tasks.description: Adds a new moving hazard to the procedural arena: a slow-moving, concentrated laser beam that continuously bounces off the arena walls. Instead of static hitboxes, this hazard creates moving damage zones that balls must kite around or carefully dash through.

tasks.title: Nemesis Leaderboard and Rewards
tasks.description: Expand the nemesis system to include a global leaderboard displaying the most notorious rivalries. Players who defeat their nemeses during special timed events could earn unique cosmetics, titles, and bonus prestige tokens.

tasks.title: Nemesis Bounties
tasks.description: Introduce a bounty system where players can place bounties on their nemeses using prestige tokens. If another player or AI defeats a bounty target, they receive a portion of the tokens, while the player who placed the bounty gets a temporary buff.

tasks.title: Shrinking Trap Arena Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where the arena slowly shrinks over time, but instead of just a damaging wall, the shrinking border leaves behind an increasing density of explosive landmines, forcing players into smaller safe zones with less room to maneuver.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Ball
tasks.description: A new ball type that can temporarily entangle with another ball (friend or foe). While entangled, any damage or healing one receives is shared 50/50, and their movements are slightly tethered together. Useful for dragging a strong enemy down or saving an ally.

tasks.title: Decoy Mirrors
tasks.description: Hazard objects that look like solid walls but are actually reflective illusions. Passing through them creates a temporary fake decoy of the ball that moves in the opposite direction.

tasks.title: Friendly Fire Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard that when stepped on causes all friendly fire damage to be reflected back onto the attacker for 5 seconds.

tasks.title: Gravity Inversion Booster
tasks.description: A booster that temporarily flips gravity for all enemy balls, making them stick to walls and ceilings.

tasks.title: Terrain interactions with elements
tasks.description: When elemental attacks like elemental burst hit certain terrains (e.g. water puddles or ice), they trigger secondary effects such as extending the radius or freezing enemies.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Link
tasks.description: A new utility skill that connects two allied balls via quantum entanglement. When one takes damage, it's shared equally, but they both gain increased movement speed and stamina regeneration as long as they stay within a certain radius of each other.

tasks.title: Decoy Swap Ability
tasks.description: An ability that allows the player to swap places with one of their active decoys, confusing enemies and escaping dangerous situations.

tasks.title: Portal Relay Mode
tasks.description: A mode where two pairs of interconnected portals periodically spawn and swap positions, allowing players to instantly traverse the map but also throwing unexpected hazards through the rifts.

tasks.title: Decoy Overcharge Aura
tasks.description: While a decoy is active, it emits an aura that grants slightly increased speed and stamina regeneration to allies within a certain radius, providing a buffing utility before it explodes or is destroyed.

tasks.title: Shrinking Floor Grid
tasks.description: Instead of a smooth circular shrinking zone, the arena is made of hexagonal tiles that independently glow red and fall away, reducing the safe map area into fragmented islands that players must jump between.

tasks.title: Seismic Shockwave Modulator
tasks.description: A deployable hazard that acts like a thumper from Dune. It periodically sends out a seismic pulse that temporarily disables enemy skills in a wide radius and draws aggro from neutral environmental entities like tornados.

tasks.title: Explosive Decoys
tasks.description: A new mutator where decoys explode upon expiration or death, dealing area-of-effect damage to nearby enemies.

tasks.title: Mirror Image Decoys
tasks.description: The deploy_decoy ability creates two decoys instead of one. The extra decoy behaves similarly but takes double damage. If both decoys explode simultaneously, their explosion radiuses combine for a massive blast.

tasks.title: Bumper Cars Mutator
tasks.description: A physics-based mutator where collisions between balls deal minimal damage but apply massive knockback. The arena gradually shrinks towards a central spike pit, turning the game into a chaotic sumo-style knockout match where positioning is key.

tasks.title: Capture the Point (King of the Hill variant)
tasks.description: Multiple control points spawn around the arena. Teams must stand inside the control points to capture them and accumulate points. The points periodically change locations. The team that reaches the target score first wins.

tasks.title: Invisibility Booster
tasks.description: A booster that renders a ball temporarily invisible to AI tracking and opponent targeting, giving them a stealth advantage for a short duration.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Hazard
tasks.description: A new weather event or procedural hazard that shoots chain lightning between nearby balls, damaging them and forcing them to spread out.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zone Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard that acts like a typical Battle Royale shrinking circle. Balls taking damage outside the shrinking radius.

tasks.title: Sniper Laser Tripwire
tasks.description: A deployable thin hazard line. When an enemy crosses it, they take significant instant damage and their movement speed is halved for 5 seconds.

tasks.title: Shrinking Speed Cap Mode
tasks.description: As the game progresses, the maximum speed cap for all entities decreases steadily, forcing players into more strategic and confined maneuvering.

tasks.title: Weather Influences Tornadoes
tasks.description: In 'Thunderstorm' weather, tornadoes naturally move faster around the arena and have an increased tangential pull radius.

tasks.title: Random Item Re-roll Mode
tasks.description: Periodically, all active items and boosters in the arena randomly transform into different item types, keeping players constantly adapting.

tasks.title: Tornado Combos
tasks.description: If a fire or poison hazard intersects with a tornado hazard, it becomes a 'Firenado' or 'Poison Tornado' that applies the respective DOT effects to pulled targets.

tasks.title: Payload Speed Boost
tasks.description: The payload moves faster when more teammates are near it.

tasks.title: Payload Healing Aura
tasks.description: Payloads constantly heal nearby teammates to encourage sticking together.

tasks.title: Reflect Shield Overcharge Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where reflect shields have 300% capacity but passively drain the owner's stamina while active. If the shield breaks, the explosion radius and damage are doubled.

tasks.title: Crowd Betting System
tasks.description: Allow the crowd to place bets on which team or player will win. If the underdog wins, the crowd's excitement spikes significantly more, and the winning team gets a huge prestige bonus.

tasks.title: Interactive Streamer Mode
tasks.description: Integrate Twitch or similar platforms where actual viewers can type commands to throw specific hazards or power-ups into the arena, directly mapping real-world crowd interactions to the in-game crowd system.

tasks.title: Decoy Hologram Projector
tasks.description: A consumable item that spawns 3 fragile holograms of the player that run in different directions to confuse enemies. The holograms vanish immediately if they take any damage.

tasks.title: Reverse Tug of War Mode
tasks.description: Like Tug of War, but the payload moves AWAY from the team that has more players nearby. Teams must zone out enemies and avoid getting too close to the payload to push it towards the enemy goal.

tasks.title: Payload Bomb Mode
tasks.description: A single payload starts in the center with a ticking timer. If it reaches an enemy goal before time runs out, it explodes and deals massive damage to the enemy team's core. If the timer runs out while it's in the middle, it explodes and kills players nearby.

tasks.title: Solar Flare Weather Event
tasks.description: Periodically, the arena suffers an extreme solar flare that disables all deployed hazards and traps and prevents active skills from regenerating for 5 seconds.

tasks.title: Dynamic Platforms
tasks.description: Introduce platforms in the procedural arena that slowly move. Balls standing on them are carried across the map, allowing for strategic repositioning.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Mine
tasks.description: A hazard trap that links two enemies who walk near it. Any damage dealt to one is mirrored onto the other, and if one moves too far from the other, they are yanked violently back together.

tasks.title: Orbital Strike Debris
tasks.description: When an orbital strike finishes, spawn 3-5 temporary debris hazards around its impact zone. These slow down balls heavily as they navigate the crater area for the next 10 seconds, but give cover from projectiles.

tasks.title: EMP Strike Variation
tasks.description: Add a variant of the orbital strike (EMP Strike) that deals 0 damage but instantly drains all skill cooldowns and stamina of any ball caught inside the blast zone for 5 seconds.

tasks.title: Breach Charges
tasks.description: Attackers can pick up 'Breach Charges' that temporarily destroy bumpers or walls in choke points, allowing for alternative entry vectors against entrenched defenders.

tasks.title: Sabotage the Springs Mode
tasks.description: In Siege mode, attackers can choose to capture and permanently destroy defender healing springs instead of using them, shifting the balance of resources as the game progresses and creating new strategic choices.

tasks.title: Ricochet Shield
tasks.description: A temporary buff where colliding with a projectile reflects it back at the attacker.

tasks.title: Gravity Boots
tasks.description: A passive item that makes the ball immune to pull forces like black holes and magnets.

tasks.title: Zone Tracking Missiles
tasks.description: Add a new booster that fires homing missiles towards the safe zone center, damaging enemies clustered there.

tasks.title: Blackout Weather Event
tasks.description: Add a periodic blackout event where the arena is fully dark, and balls rely purely on short-range vision.

tasks.title: Quantum Dodge Ability
tasks.description: Allows a ball to briefly enter a quantum state, dodging all incoming attacks and passing through hazards unscathed. This would cost significant stamina but could turn the tide of an engagement.

tasks.title: Kinetic Rebounder Module
tasks.description: A booster item that surrounds the ball in a kinetic shield, converting incoming projectile damage into speed and attack power for their next melee attack.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zones with Moving Centers
tasks.description: Instead of a static shrinking circle, the center of the safe zone drifts around the map while shrinking, forcing players to constantly adapt their positioning.

tasks.title: Slime Trails
tasks.description: Players leave behind a temporary trail of slime that slows down any opponents that cross it, giving evasive players a strong kiting tool.

tasks.title: Underground Tunnel Network
tasks.description: Procedural arenas can spawn underground tunnels, allowing balls to temporarily travel underneath obstacles. While underground, balls are invisible and cannot be targeted, but can only emerge at specific tunnel exits.

tasks.title: Guild Wars System
tasks.description: Players can join or create guilds. Guilds can compete in guild vs guild battles to earn guild points. Points are used to upgrade guild level, which unlocks exclusive buffs, banners, and special cosmetics for all members.

tasks.title: Payload Abilities
tasks.description: The payload in Escort Mode should have a unique set of abilities, like dropping a barrier to shield defenders or temporarily knocking back attackers.

tasks.title: Escort Diverging Paths
tasks.description: Add diverging paths for the payload to choose from in Escort Mode, some with less hazards but longer, others with higher risks but faster.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning
tasks.description: A new skill or hazard that hits a primary target and bounces to nearby targets, dealing less damage with each bounce.

tasks.title: Black Hole Bomb
tasks.description: A throwable or placeable bomb that sucks nearby balls towards it before exploding for massive damage.

tasks.title: Decoy Remote Detonation
tasks.description: Allow players to manually trigger their decoy explosions by activating their decoy skill again while it's already active.

tasks.title: Chain Reaction Decoys
tasks.description: If a decoy explosion hits another allied decoy, it causes a chain reaction, exploding the second decoy with increased radius and damage.

tasks.title: Phase Shift Skill
tasks.description: A temporary ability that allows a ball to become intangible for 3 seconds. While intangible, they take no damage and can pass through walls and hazards, but they also cannot attack or collect items.

tasks.title: Bouncy dash variant
tasks.description: Dash that bounces off walls.

tasks.title: Teleporting dash
tasks.description: Instead of dashing, teleport to target.

tasks.title: Skill Re-roll Item
tasks.description: A rare booster item that drops occasionally which randomly re-rolls the ball's current unique skill for another one until the end of the round.

tasks.title: Echo Clones Mode
tasks.description: Every few seconds, a trail of static clones is left behind every ball. If an enemy touches a clone, it detonates and deals damage.

tasks.title: Interactive Twitch Integration
tasks.description: Allow real spectators via Twitch or YouTube chat to vote on the crowd events in real-time by typing keywords into chat, bypassing the simulated probability-based voting system.

tasks.title: Player Bribery Mechanism
tasks.description: Players can use a currency earned during matches to 'bribe' the crowd system, either instantly ending an ongoing vote they dislike or slightly skewing the result toward a favorable outcome.

tasks.title: Bounty Reward System
tasks.description: When a Bounty Hunter successfully defeats a target marked as a bounty, they instantly receive a full health restore and a temporary speed boost.

tasks.title: Laser Tripwire
tasks.description: A tripwire that shoots a powerful laser beam when a player crosses it.

tasks.title: Bounty Hunter Tracking UI
tasks.description: Add a special UI indicator that points the Bounty Hunter towards their marked target, even if they are out of normal vision range.

tasks.title: Meteor Shower Event
tasks.description: A random weather event where meteors fall from the sky, damaging balls and destroying terrain in the arena.

tasks.title: Weapon Drop Mode
tasks.description: Players start without any attacks. Weapons randomly drop around the map, and players must collect them to deal damage.

tasks.title: Chant-driven Boosters
tasks.description: If a team's chant lasts for a consecutive amount of time due to high excitement and dominance, players on that team get a temporary 'Adrenaline' buff boosting their speed.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Booster
tasks.description: An item that pairs the collector with the closest enemy. Any damage taken by either ball is shared between both, creating new strategic dilemmas.

tasks.title: Interactive Crowd Signs
tasks.description: Spectators (crowd) can hold up dynamic virtual signs (using UI text popups around the arena edges) supporting specific balls, and these signs get larger if that ball is performing well.

tasks.title: Bumper Car Arena Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where balls deal zero direct damage. Instead, balls bounce off each other with massively increased knockback, and the only way to eliminate opponents is to push them into outer hazard zones.

tasks.title: Invisible Walls Arena
tasks.description: The arena contains several invisible walls that only become temporarily visible when a player or attack collides with them.

tasks.title: Interactive Weather Alters
tasks.description: Add control nodes (alters) to the center of the arena that players can capture. Capturing an alter allows a team to instantly change the current weather to their team's advantage (e.g., a Swamp team changing it to Rain to boost their stats). This creates mini-objectives around controlling the environment.

tasks.title: Weather-Specific Boss Monsters
tasks.description: Introduce mega-minions or 'Bosses' that only spawn during rare extreme weather events (e.g., a Lightning Elemental during a Thunderstorm, or a Frost Titan during a Blizzard). Defeating them drops powerful, unique boosters that cannot be acquired otherwise, giving players a major incentive to risk fighting in dangerous weather conditions.

tasks.title: Reverse Time Pickup
tasks.description: An item that, when picked up, rewinds the player's position and health back to where they were 3 seconds ago, offering a get-out-of-jail-free card.

tasks.title: Time Stop Relic
tasks.description: An ancient relic that, when collected, completely pauses time for all enemies and hazards for 3 seconds, allowing the user to reposition or escape.

tasks.title: Black Hole Generator
tasks.description: A rare collectable item that deploys a massive gravity well which pulls all entities towards the center and explodes after a short delay.

tasks.title: Black Hole mode
tasks.description: A new mode where a black hole in the center slowly grows and pulls players inwards.

tasks.title: Shrinking Maps Arena
tasks.description: An arena type where the physical map boundaries slowly shrink inwards over time, pushing all balls towards a centralized final showdown.

tasks.title: Shrinking Arena Edge Modifier
tasks.description: A new arena hazard mode where the boundary of the arena slowly shrinks over time, dealing significant damage to anyone caught outside the safe zone.

tasks.title: Juggernaut Ball Type
tasks.description: A new ball type that gains temporary shield and damage boost based on the number of enemies within its perception radius, making it incredibly dangerous in crowded areas but weak in 1v1 engagements.

tasks.title: Black Hole Arena Hazard
tasks.description: An extremely large, slow-moving hazard that acts similarly to the gravity well but actively sucks in surrounding small hazards (like traps or spikes) and grows larger. It tests players' abilities to use boosts or specific game modes to escape its ever-increasing event horizon.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Tether
tasks.description: A new booster or mutator that randomly entangles pairs of balls. When entangled, any status effect, knockback force, or damage applied to one ball is also mirrored to the other, encouraging highly strategic cooperative (or intentionally self-destructive) plays to eliminate linked opponents.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zone
tasks.description: A battle royale classic mechanic: a circular safe zone slowly shrinks over time. Balls outside the safe zone take continuous damage. This forces players closer together and prevents stalling in the corners of the arena.

tasks.title: Bouncy Walls
tasks.description: Add a new hazard or arena modifier where the arena walls become extremely bouncy. If a ball hits the wall at high speed, it ricochets with even more speed, making dodging harder and creating chaotic high-speed collisions.

tasks.title: Game Mode: Freeze Tag
tasks.description: Players can freeze enemies upon collision. Frozen enemies cannot move or attack until an ally collides with them to unfreeze them. The game ends when one team is completely frozen.

tasks.title: Spiked Walls Game Mode
tasks.description: A new mutator/game mode where the arena walls are lined with spikes. Hitting a wall doesn't just do scaling velocity damage, but also applies a bleeding effect that drains HP slowly over time until the player stops moving.

tasks.title: Wall Bounce Combos
tasks.description: If a player manages to knock an opponent into a wall multiple times in quick succession (or hit multiple walls with one knockback), the wall damage multiplier significantly increases, and the attacking player gets a temporary speed boost.

tasks.title: Random Event: Meteor Shower
tasks.description: Periodically, shadows appear on the ground, growing in size. After a short delay, meteors strike those locations, leaving behind temporary lava puddles that deal damage over time to anyone stepping in them.

tasks.title: Speed Booster Overdrive
tasks.description: When an entity picks up multiple speed boosters sequentially, rather than simply refreshing the timer, it gains 'Speed Overdrive' which makes it immune to all slow and freeze effects while the overdrive lasts.

tasks.title: Stamina Drain Hazard Pulse
tasks.description: Hazard zones that currently drain stamina will occasionally pulse, applying a 1-second silence effect if the entity caught within them has zero stamina.

tasks.title: Ghost Mode Booster
tasks.description: A temporary power-up that makes the ball phase through walls and become immune to non-energy projectiles for 5 seconds. However, attacking breaks the ghost mode early, creating a strategic choice for positioning versus offense.

tasks.title: Decoy Confusion Matrix
tasks.description: Trickster's decoys now periodically swap positions with each other, further confusing enemies trying to track the real player.

tasks.title: Storm Conduit Hazard
tasks.description: A new static hazard that becomes active during magnetic storms...

tasks.title: Grounding Boots Booster
tasks.description: An item that protects entities from chain damage...

tasks.title: Friction Zones
tasks.description: Zones that increase turning capabilities.

tasks.title: Teleport Trails
tasks.description: Swapping with a decoy leaves a brief electric trail between the original and new position that damages enemies who cross it.

tasks.title: Gravitational Anomaly
tasks.description: A random event that alters the physics of the arena. Projectiles curve, movement speed is affected depending on the direction of travel relative to the anomaly's center.

tasks.title: Tornado Surfing Skill
tasks.description: A specific ball type or skill that allows the entity to intentionally enter a tornado to gain a massive speed boost and be launched across the map instead of taking damage.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zones with Obstacles
tasks.description: The safe zone shrinks, but moving walls or hazards are added to the middle making players fight and navigate obstacles simultaneously.

tasks.title: Multi-Safe Zones
tasks.description: Instead of one big safe zone, multiple tiny safe zones spawn randomly across the map, shrinking and splitting over time.

tasks.title: Ball Customization Traits
tasks.description: Allow players to pick minor starting traits (e.g. +5% speed, -5% health) to customize their playstyle.

tasks.title: Weather dominance event
tasks.description: An arena event where two weather types are competing (e.g. fire vs ice). Players must capture points to determine which weather type takes over the arena, providing buffs to the winning team.

tasks.title: Clan Wars Tournaments
tasks.description: Introduces structured weekly tournaments where clans face off against each other. Players queue in special clan-only matchmaking lobbies, earning points for their clan based on their survival time and eliminations. Winning clans receive exclusive banners and guild-wide passive buffs.

tasks.title: Weather-Adaptive Shields
tasks.description: A new loadout item 'Weather Shield' that absorbs negative status effects (e.g. wet, cold, sandblind) and converts them into a temporary health regeneration boost.

tasks.title: Tornado Hazard in Windstorm
tasks.description: Introduce wandering Tornado hazards specifically during the Windstorm mode. Tornados pull balls towards them and scramble their movement vectors for a brief duration.

tasks.title: Weather Effects Expansion
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic weather patterns like rain reducing friction or heatwaves increasing stamina consumption.

tasks.title: Dynamic Map Events
tasks.description: Random events that occur during the match to spice up the gameplay. Examples include sudden meteor showers that deal massive AoE damage, a low-gravity zone that expands in the center, or mysterious loot goblins that spawn and run away, dropping rare temporary boosters if destroyed.

tasks.title: Orbital Gravity Zones
tasks.description: A hazard that exerts a perpendicular force instead of just pushing/pulling, causing players to orbit its center rather than simply falling in or out.

tasks.title: Mud Puddles Hazard
tasks.description: Introduce mud puddles as a new procedural hazard. Balls moving through a mud puddle will have their movement speed significantly reduced by 50% and their turn rate hindered, making them easy targets. Unlike tall grass, they remain fully visible, adding a different kind of positioning tradeoff to the arena.

tasks.title: Bouncing Hazard Mines
tasks.description: Add new hazards called mine_bounce. When a player gets close to them, they detonate and apply a massive knockback force to all nearby entities without doing much HP damage.

tasks.title: Blackhole Granade Item
tasks.description: A new booster that allows balls to throw a blackhole grenade that creates a small temporary black hole hazard upon explosion, pulling in enemies and dealing damage.
