tasks.title: Nemesis Faction War
tasks.description: Introduces a global faction war event where players align with either Light or Dark factions. Completing nemesis revenge kills earns points for the chosen faction. The winning faction at the end of the season unlocks a unique, faction-themed ball type for all its participants.

tasks.title: Weather Reactive Traps
tasks.description: Introduce generic trap objects in procedural arenas that change their behavior based on the current weather. For instance, a basic proximity mine could become a frost mine during blizzards, freezing enemies instead of dealing pure damage, or turn into an electric tether during thunderstorms.

tasks.title: Tsunami Wave Entity
tasks.description: Convert the tsunami weather event to visually and physically spawn a giant, screen-wide wave entity that travels across the screen from one side, acting as a massive moving hazard that players must outrun or use boosters to dive under.

tasks.title: Earthquake Weather Event
tasks.description: A new weather event in ExtremeWeatherMode where the ground shakes violently, randomly applying forces to players in random directions and temporarily disabling standard steering controls.

tasks.title: Lava Interactions for Skills
tasks.description: Expand elemental terrain interactions to lava hazards. For example, using a water-based skill like Elemental Burst over lava could create a steam cloud that provides temporary stealth to nearby allies, or using Earth-based attacks could temporarily solidify the lava into walkable ground.

tasks.title: Trap Disarm Kit
tasks.description: A new rare item 'Trap Disarm Kit'. When used, it temporarily reveals all invisible traps in a large radius and destroys any trap the user rolls over for the next 5 seconds without triggering them.

tasks.title: Quantum Tangle Mode
tasks.description: Players are paired randomly and any damage taken by one player is shared with the other, requiring tight coordination and careful play.

tasks.title: Wall Ricochet Combos
tasks.description: After a ball is pulled into a wall by the reverse gravity booster (or just hits a wall at high speeds), the ball should get a 'combo window'. Hitting an enemy immediately after bouncing off the wall gives double damage or increased knockback, encouraging skilled placement near walls.

tasks.title: Grappling Hook Refactor
tasks.description: Make the grappling hook pull you towards geometry if it hits a wall instead of another player.

tasks.title: Anti-Gravity Hazard Traps
tasks.description: Introduce a new type of placeable hazard trap that creates a localized zero-gravity or reverse-gravity bubble. Any enemy ball stepping inside loses all friction and gets slowly pushed towards the edge of the arena, making them easy targets for snipers and tricksters.

tasks.title: Evolving Arena Mode
tasks.description: The arena boundaries constantly shift and evolve, forcing players to adapt to an ever-changing layout while avoiding hazards.

tasks.title: Weather Stations
tasks.description: Add capture-able weather stations in the arena that let a team control the weather in their sector.

tasks.title: Hazard Traps System
tasks.description: Introduce a new system where certain ball types can place invisible traps that trigger status effects on enemies when they come too close, allowing for more strategic area control.

tasks.title: Mirror Ball Type
tasks.description: A new ball type that can temporarily turn completely reflective. While active, any direct projectile hits or continuous laser damage is reflected back towards the nearest enemy.

tasks.title: Tether Pull Booster
tasks.description: A booster that grants the ability to shoot a tether at an enemy. The enemy is pulled towards the user for 3 seconds, making them easier targets for melee balls or environmental hazards.

tasks.title: Orbital Minefield Utility Skill
tasks.description: A skill that spawns 3 small mines that orbit the player ball continuously. If an enemy comes within a small radius, the mines detach and seek the enemy before detonating.

tasks.title: Mirage Mine
tasks.description: A trap that looks like a high-tier healing spring or booster. When collected, instead of granting the effect, it creates a temporary fake clone of the player that taunts enemy AI into attacking it while granting the player brief invisibility.

tasks.title: Mirage Clone Swap
tasks.description: A survival skill where the ball spawns a decoy and after 3 seconds, instantly swaps positions with the decoy, confusing enemies and redirecting aggro.

tasks.title: Chain Reaction Game Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where every kill triggers an explosion that scales in radius and damage based on the killed ball's current killstreak. Players must carefully manage their spacing to avoid chain wipes.

tasks.title: Holo-Decoy Augment
tasks.description: An advanced deploy_decoy variant where the decoys phase out immediately upon taking fatal damage, blinding all enemies in a 300 unit radius for 3 seconds instead of exploding, turning defensive plays into aggressive counter-attacks.

tasks.title: Decoy Network Passive
tasks.description: A new passive ability that connects all active decoys on the field via an energy beam. Enemies that cross the beam take constant low damage and have their movement speed reduced by 30%.

tasks.title: Reverse Tag
tasks.description: Instead of avoiding the 'IT' player, being 'IT' gives passive points. When a player collides with 'IT', they steal the status. To prevent stalling, the 'IT' status drains max HP slowly, forcing them to tag someone else eventually.

tasks.title: King of the Hill - Gravity Well
tasks.description: A game mode where balls must stay near a central point to earn points. However, a gravity well pulses every 10 seconds, pushing everyone away, requiring players to time their movements.

tasks.title: Weather-Adaptive Hazard Types
tasks.description: Introduce generic trap objects that change their literal 'kind' string and visual appearance (e.g. into 'ice_patch' or 'quicksand') based on weather changes, standardizing trap behaviors across modes.

tasks.title: Temperature Mechanics
tasks.description: Add a temperature gauge to the arena that rises in heatwaves and drops in blizzards. Balls must manage their internal temperature with boosters or specific hazard zones to prevent freezing or overheating (DoT or stun).

tasks.title: Random Teleporter Mode
tasks.description: Periodically, portals randomly appear on the map and teleport balls to random locations, breaking positioning strategies.

tasks.title: Expanding Healing Zone
tasks.description: A battle royale variation where instead of a shrinking danger zone, there's a slow-moving expanding healing zone. Being inside heals players but makes them more visible to enemies.

tasks.title: Reverse Booster Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where all boosters collected have the opposite of their intended effect, forcing players to avoid items they usually collect.

tasks.title: Phase-Shifting Hazard
tasks.description: A new hazard type that cycles between solid (blocks movement) and damaging (passes through but deals heavy damage over time).

tasks.title: Vampiric Drone
tasks.description: A drone item that follows the player and periodically drains a small amount of health from nearby enemies, transferring it to the player.

tasks.title: Portal Gun Trap
tasks.description: A deployable trap that shoots players to a random location in the arena, disorienting them and potentially dropping them into hazards.

tasks.title: Gravity Swap Anomaly
tasks.description: A rare hazard that, when triggered, temporarily reverses the gravitational pull of Black Holes and Gravity Wells in the arena, turning them into intense repulsors that scatter balls across the map.

tasks.title: Elemental Resonance Trap
tasks.description: A new trap that behaves like a normal mine, but instead of dealing damage, it forcefully spawns a random elemental hazard (fire zone or poison cloud) at its location upon triggering. If a tornado touches it, it creates a massive elemental explosion before converting the tornado into an elemental storm.

tasks.title: Quantum Tunneling Modifier
tasks.description: A new mutator that occasionally allows balls moving at extremely high speeds to pass directly through hazards or walls without taking damage, encouraging high-risk, high-velocity playstyles.

tasks.title: Tornado Spawning Anomaly Event
tasks.description: An arena-wide event where miniature tornadoes spawn periodically across the map for a limited time. They last 10 seconds and have high velocity, causing utter chaos. These miniature tornadoes can also combine with elemental hazards to become mini-firenados or mini-poison tornadoes.

tasks.title: Shrinking Danger Zones Arena
tasks.description: A dynamic procedural arena element where circular 'danger zones' periodically appear on the map. After a warning delay, any balls caught within the zone take heavy damage. The zones gradually shrink in size over the course of the match, forcing close-quarters combat.

tasks.title: VIP Bodyguard Bounties
tasks.description: Players can dynamically purchase a 'Bodyguard Bounty' using score or in-game resources, placing a massive reward on a chosen ally to incentivize the entire team to protect them while drawing enemies.

tasks.title: Solar Powered Ball
tasks.description: A new ball type 'solar_bot' that naturally regenerates HP and stamina as long as the arena is well lit, but suffers heavy debuffs (speed, damage) during blackouts or eclipses. It uses a unique skill 'Solar Flare' that burns nearby enemies and briefly lights up a dark area.

tasks.title: Payload Turret Attachment
tasks.description: Allow specific defensive or supportive entities to be 'attached' to payloads in Escort and Dual Payload modes. When a payload gathers enough players around it to reach a certain speed threshold, it temporarily spawns an automated defensive turret that damages or repels approaching enemies, making coordination even more rewarding.

tasks.title: Magnetic Repulsion Field Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where all balls naturally repel each other slightly. The strength of repulsion increases as they get closer, making it difficult to land melee attacks and creating a pinball-like arena effect during high-speed collisions.

tasks.title: Interactive Hologram Spectators
tasks.description: During intense matches, high-excitement crowd events can spawn physical holograms of the spectators along the arena edges. These holograms can block projectiles or be interacted with to cheer and grant minor speed buffs to nearby players.

tasks.title: Dynamic Spotlight Hazards
tasks.description: In blackout mode or night stages, introduce 'spotlight' hazards that roam the arena. Standing in a spotlight grants a massive vision boost and restores stamina, but reveals your position to all players and makes you take 1.5x damage from attacks.

tasks.title: Sabotage Zone in Escort
tasks.description: In Escort and Dual Payload modes, an 'anti-payload' hazard zone sporadically spawns on the map. If a payload passes through this zone, its speed is temporarily halved, regardless of how many allies are near it. Attackers can strategically use push/pull tools to force payloads into these zones to buy more time.

tasks.title: Magnetic Minefield Hazard
tasks.description: New procedural arena hazard that spawns inactive magnetic mines. When a ball comes within a certain proximity, the mine starts slowly dragging the ball towards it before exploding in a massive shockwave.

tasks.title: Quantum Singularity Trap
tasks.description: A rare deployable trap that sucks in nearby players and projectiles, gradually slowing them down and increasing collision damage within its event horizon before violently exploding.

tasks.title: Guild Headquarters Customization & Siege Defense
tasks.description: Allow guilds to spend resources on building automated defenses (turrets, traps, barricades) in their HQ area on the persistent GvG map. Opposing guilds can attempt HQ sieges, where breaking defenses steals resources directly from the defending guild's vault. Successfully holding off a siege grants guild XP to the defenders.

tasks.title: Glitch Ball Sub-Type
tasks.description: A new ball type 'Glitch' that randomly teleports short distances when hit and occasionally reverses its own movement vector, making it highly unpredictable but hard to control.

tasks.title: Bounty Hunter Mercenary Role
tasks.description: Add a new 'Bounty Hunter' ball type specifically balanced around hunting marked targets. When hitting an enemy with a bounty, the Bounty Hunter gains temporary speed and attack speed buffs. Additionally, if a Bounty Hunter secures a bounty kill, a percentage of the reward is distributed to their personal profile currency rather than strictly guild resources.

tasks.title: Bouncing Payload Mode
tasks.description: The payload in Tug of War moves incredibly fast but bounces off walls and players instead of being a slow and steady push. Players must carefully angle themselves to reflect the payload towards the enemy goal, akin to air hockey.

tasks.title: Payload Swap Mode
tasks.description: Two payloads are spawned, one for each team. The twist is that each team needs to push the *other* team's payload into the opposing goal. The payloads deal slight damage if a team member is near their own payload, forcing them to focus on the enemy payload.

tasks.title: Payload Abilities Based on Teammates
tasks.description: As more teammates stand near a payload in Tug of War or Escort mode, the payload gains temporary abilities (like a small healing aura, a reflecting shield, or damaging pulses to enemies).

tasks.title: Payload Traps Mode
tasks.description: In payload modes, when the payload crosses certain points in the arena, it drops temporary static traps or buff zones for its controlling team to use.

tasks.title: Payload Overheal Shield
tasks.description: When a payload heals a teammate who is already at max HP, it instead generates a temporary shield that absorbs one instance of incoming damage.

tasks.title: Kinetic Bounce Walls
tasks.description: Arena walls that absorb impact energy and reflect entities back with a velocity proportional to their incoming momentum, while spawning temporary defensive shields around the impact zone.

tasks.title: Chain Bounties
tasks.description: When a player successfully claims a bounty, a smaller bounty is automatically placed on them, encouraging dynamic target shifting and continuous engagements.

tasks.title: Bounty Trap Item
tasks.description: An item that players can place on the field, which tags the first enemy to touch it with a small bounty that grants the placer a reward when the enemy dies.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zone Game Mode
tasks.description: A battle royale mode where the boundaries slowly constrict over time. Staying outside the boundary deals continuous damage until elimination.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zone based on Kills
tasks.description: The safe zone shrinks naturally over time, but every time a team gets a kill, the safe zone pauses its shrinking for 5 seconds.

tasks.title: Quantum Swap Mode
tasks.description: A new GameMode where players occasionally swap positions with an enemy player at random intervals, confusing targeting and causing chaos. The swap is telegraphed by a small portal particle effect beneath the players 1 second before the swap happens.

tasks.title: Abyssal Anchor Hazard
tasks.description: A new heavy hazard type that drops in the arena and periodically unleashes a massive magnetic shockwave that pulls players toward it while dealing damage. If a player touches the center of the anchor, they are completely stunned for 2 seconds.

tasks.title: Orbital Strike Satellite Event
tasks.description: An event where a slowly moving satellite crosshair tracks players in the arena. Once it locks on for a few seconds, it fires a devastating orbital beam that creates an irradiated zone reducing stamina regen for a short time.

tasks.title: Bounty Target Switch
tasks.description: During Bounty Hunter mode, the targeted player swaps randomly every 30 seconds. A siren effect sounds, and a new player becomes the high-value target, requiring dynamic on-the-fly strategy shifts from all teams.

tasks.title: Crystallized Armor Booster
tasks.description: A rare booster that coats the player in hardened crystal. The armor fully negates the next 3 instances of damage, but each hit slows the player's movement speed slightly until the armor breaks entirely, sending shrapnel outward.

tasks.title: Musical Chairs Game Mode
tasks.description: Periodically, several small safe zones appear across the map. When the timer hits zero, players not inside a safe zone take massive damage. The number of safe zones decreases each round.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Ball Type
tasks.description: A ball type that pairs its health and speed to an enemy at the start of the round. Any damage it takes is partially distributed to the enemy, forcing opponents to rethink target prioritization.

tasks.title: Reverse Escort Mode
tasks.description: Similar to Escort Mode, but instead of one team escorting an invulnerable payload, both teams must push the payload toward the center, acting as a shared 'Tug of War' towards a mutual goal point where it generates points over time for the team holding it closer.

tasks.title: Bounty Escalation Scaling
tasks.description: Bounties dynamically increase their reward pool over time based on the distance traveled by the targeted player, incentivizing fast and prolonged chases while adding risk-reward for running away.

tasks.title: Reverse Magnet Zones
tasks.description: Hazard zones that push players away from their center rather than pulling them in, creating impassable barriers unless players have a speed or dash boost to push through.

tasks.title: Temperature-Dependent Powerups
tasks.description: Create powerups that scale in effectiveness based on the arena temperature, such as a Heat Shield that blocks more damage in high-temperature environments.

tasks.title: Wind System
tasks.description: Introduce global wind vectors that slightly alter ball movement trajectories and hazard positions (like poison gas or tornadoes).

tasks.title: Weather Manipulation Booster
tasks.description: A new booster that allows the user to change the current arena weather for 10 seconds. This could be used defensively (e.g. summoning rain to put out fire/reduce fire damage, or fog to reduce enemy perception) or offensively (e.g. thunderstorm to speed up tornadoes and increase their pull radius).

tasks.title: Tornado Skill Modification
tasks.description: Balls with the tornado skill can now absorb elemental properties of other hazards they collide with. For example, if a player's tornado collides with a poison puddle, it becomes a poison_tornado, or colliding with a fire trap turns it into a firenado, adding extra utility and combo potential to their kit.

tasks.title: Shrinking Zones based on Players
tasks.description: A game mode where the safe zone's size decreases much faster when more players are outside of it, encouraging players to fight for the center.

tasks.title: Neon Disco Event Mode
tasks.description: The arena turns into a disco floor during this event. The ground changes colors rhythmically, and balls must stay on the matching color to avoid taking damage. Balls gain increased speed and stamina regeneration while on the correct color.

tasks.title: Solar Eclipse Event Mode
tasks.description: An event where the sun is gradually blocked. As the eclipse progresses, vision gradually decreases, solar panels provide less power, and at full totality, shadow monsters spawn rapidly and all balls become temporarily invisible to each other.

tasks.title: Orbital Relay Booster
tasks.description: A rare booster that, when collected, temporarily links the collector to the game's hazard spawner. For the next 10 seconds, the player is immune to orbital strikes and debris, and any orbital strikes that occur will automatically target the enemies closest to the player, turning a hazard into an offensive tool.

tasks.title: Lightning Rod Booster
tasks.description: A new booster that acts as a lightning rod. When collected, the ball becomes immune to lightning strikes for 20 seconds. More importantly, if a lightning strike occurs nearby while the booster is active, the strike is redirected directly onto the player, converting the damage into a massive healing burst and a stamina refill instead of stunning them.

tasks.title: EMP Grenade
tasks.description: Disables enemy abilities for 3 seconds in an area.

tasks.title: Guild Alliances and Wars
tasks.description: Allow guilds to form alliances or declare wars against rival guilds, with exclusive territory control benefits and resource taxes imposed on the losing side.

tasks.title: Aura Reversal Field
tasks.description: An environmental hazard zone. While inside, all active beneficial auras (like healing or damage boosts) on players invert their effects, causing steady damage or reducing attack damage until they exit.

tasks.title: Orbital Magnet Hazard
tasks.description: A new hazard type that activates near the end of the match. It acts as an area-of-effect magnet, pulling all balls, boosters, and even smaller hazards slowly toward its center. Navigating through it requires using dash mechanics or bouncing off nearby obstacles to escape its pull.

tasks.title: Twitch Interactive Leaderboard
tasks.description: Create a viewer loyalty leaderboard that tracks which Twitch viewers spawned the most impactful hazards or voted correctly in the crowd system. Top viewers receive cosmetic badges when their name appears in the kill feed.

tasks.title: Supercharged Balls Event
tasks.description: If a ball is struck by a lightning hazard and survives the stun, it gains a 'Supercharged' status for 10 seconds. Supercharged balls move 50% faster, emit tiny electric sparks that deal minor damage over time to nearby enemies, and their next attack stuns the target.

tasks.title: Crowd Emotes Over Arenas
tasks.description: Allow viewers to type specific emote commands that spawn bouncy, physics-based emote emojis in the arena. They deal no damage but can clutter the map or act as tiny dynamic obstacles for balls.

tasks.title: Bouncing Laser
tasks.description: A laser beam that bounces off arena walls.

tasks.title: Escort Supply Drops
tasks.description: Periodically spawn supply drops near the payload containing powerful buffs (e.g., invulnerability or instant ultimate charge). The drops can be contested by either team.

tasks.title: Payload Path Alteration
tasks.description: Allow Attackers to capture hack points around the map to temporarily alter the payload's path, forcing the Defenders to take a longer route.

tasks.title: Wind Currents
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic wind currents that slowly push balls and projectiles in a specific direction, altering movement and combat dynamics.

tasks.title: Decoy Transposition
tasks.description: A new skill that allows a player to instantly teleport to any of their active decoys, instantly exploding the decoy they swapped with to catch enemies off guard.

tasks.title: Decoy Network Shield
tasks.description: An energy shield that gets stronger based on the number of active allied decoys near the user, giving Decoy Masters immense defensive utility when swarmed.

tasks.title: Payload Boost Zones
tasks.description: The payload leaves a temporary speed boost trail or creates an aura that increases the movement speed of any nearby teammates, allowing the controlling team to better maneuver around the payload and defend it.

tasks.title: Overcharged Payload Explosion
tasks.description: If a team manages to push the payload to the enemy goal with maximum players nearby, the payload detonates with a massive area-of-effect explosion, heavily damaging any remaining defenders caught in the blast and creating a spectacular end to the round.

tasks.title: Magnetic Polarity Overload
tasks.description: A game mode where every ball is assigned a random Positive or Negative charge. Balls of opposite charges are pulled toward each other, while balls of the same charge repel. The charges periodically flip during the match.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Hazards
tasks.description: A hazard that spawns in pairs across the arena. Any damage or status effect taken by a ball near one hazard is partially duplicated and dealt to any ball standing near its paired hazard.

tasks.title: Kinetic Reversal Shield
tasks.description: A temporary shield that converts 100% of incoming damage into a burst of movement speed and maximum stamina, allowing for a rapid counter-attack or escape.

tasks.title: Mirror Ball Variant
tasks.description: A new ball type that perfectly reflects any negative status effect (like EMP or poison) back to the hazard source (destroying it) or directly to the attacker, but is highly vulnerable to pure kinetic damage.

tasks.title: Magnetic Gravity Mine
tasks.description: A mine that, instead of exploding, pulls all nearby enemies and physics objects toward its center for 3 seconds before detonating, creating devastating localized combos.

tasks.title: Decoy Network System
tasks.description: Introduces a sophisticated network of decoys where players can deploy multiple interconnected holograms. Enemies hitting one decoy take damage that ripples across the entire network, punishing aggressive, untargeted playstyles.

tasks.title: Interactive Chat Bounties
tasks.description: Spectators can use '!bounty <ball_id>' to place a bounty on a specific ball. If that ball is killed within a certain timeframe, the killer gets a massive score boost and a unique visual effect.

tasks.title: Twitch Chat Controlled Weather Event
tasks.description: Allow real spectators to type '!weather <type>' to change the arena temperature or spawn specific weather hazards like tornados or blizzards when the hype level is high.

tasks.title: Tornado Chains
tasks.description: A new 'Storm Link' booster that physically tethers two balls together using a miniature cyclone. The tether applies minor constant damage but drastically speeds up both players if they move in the same direction, rewarding extreme coordination or punishing unwilling captives.

tasks.title: Bouncy Wall Traps
tasks.description: Add placeable traps that act as jump pads, forcing balls that dash into them or get knocked into them to ricochet at high speeds in an unpredictable direction.

tasks.title: Orbital Laser Event
tasks.description: A slow-moving orbital laser tracks the highest-scoring ball, forcing them to constantly stay on the move while dodging other attacks.

tasks.title: New Event: Meteor Shower
tasks.description: Randomly drops explosive meteors from the sky that damage any players caught in their blast radius.

tasks.title: Phased Shift Skill
tasks.description: A temporary active skill that renders the player partially invisible and immune to terrain hazards for 3 seconds, but unable to deal damage. Good for escaping tight situations.

tasks.title: Meteor Shower Core Mechanic Integration
tasks.description: Expand meteor shower behavior so it creates small craters that linger in the arena for a few seconds. Balls falling into craters receive a temporary 'slow' debuff, turning a random hazard into a tactical space control mechanism.

tasks.title: Cosmic Storm Event Mode
tasks.description: Combine the meteor shower with zero-gravity periods. When meteors fall during zero-g, they bounce off the ground unpredictably and carry momentum, making positioning extremely chaotic and challenging.

tasks.title: Decoy Grenade
tasks.description: An item that can be thrown at a target location. Upon landing, it emits fake footstep sounds and creates visual noise (similar to multiple players moving) to draw enemy fire and mask real player movements.

tasks.title: Grapple Hook Mechanics
tasks.description: Balls can equip a grapple hook to swing around obstacles and quickly cross gaps or evade enemies.

tasks.title: New Item: Cloaking Device
tasks.description: An item that temporarily renders the player invisible to enemy AI, preventing targeting for a short duration.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Haven Booster
tasks.description: A rare booster that upon collection spawns a miniature personal safe zone that moves with the ball for a short duration, rendering them immune to environmental hazard damage.

tasks.title: Temporal Collapse
tasks.description: As the match progresses, the edges of the arena start breaking down into 'void tiles'. Touching these tiles slows the player down and randomly rewinds their movement to a previous position, disorienting them and forcing fights into the center.

tasks.title: Gravitational Mine Trap
tasks.description: A stationary mine that remains hidden until an enemy comes close. Upon detonation, instead of direct damage, it violently pulls all nearby entities toward its center before exploding in a shockwave, effectively disrupting team formations.

tasks.title: Quantum Teleportation Pads
tasks.description: Pairs of teleportation pads that can be deployed across the map. Players or hazards passing over them instantly jump to the linked pad, keeping momentum intact for creative ambushes or escapes.

tasks.title: Chant Streak Visual Effects
tasks.description: Add visual particle effects to the UI or around players when their team is on a chant streak to hype up the excitement.

tasks.title: Dynamic Music Tempo for Chants
tasks.description: Increase the tempo of the background music as a team builds up their chant streak, reflecting the growing adrenaline.

tasks.title: Vehicle Mounts
tasks.description: Players can find and mount stationary vehicles like tanks or hovercrafts across the arena. While mounted, they inherit the vehicle's health and damage stats, but lose their personal mobility traits. If the vehicle is destroyed, they are ejected with temporary stun.

tasks.title: EMP Grenades
tasks.description: A new tactical throwable that temporarily disables nearby enemies' abilities and deployed traps. Hitting an opponent with an EMP briefly sets their speed to zero and shuts off any active shield buffs.

tasks.title: Echo Strike Ability
tasks.description: A new active skill where the ball leaves behind a ghostly echo at its current position. Upon taking lethal damage or pressing the ability again, the ball teleports back to the echo, unleashing a shockwave based on the damage it took since placing the echo.

tasks.title: Chronosphere Arena Event
tasks.description: An arena-wide event where a massive chronosphere spawns. Entering it drastically increases cooldown recovery, but moving outside of it slows all animations, physics, and movement by 50% until the sphere collapses.

tasks.title: Quantum Leap Modifier
tasks.description: A rare game mode modifier where instead of standard dashes, ball abilities have a chance to trigger a randomized, short-range teleport around the arena. This creates high-stakes, unpredictable positioning during engagements, making both escapes and chases thrilling.

tasks.title: Bribe Wars UI
tasks.description: A new HUD element specifically for spectators and players that shows a live tug-of-war meter during votes. The meter visually shifts left or right as players spend skill points and prestige tokens to actively out-bribe each other on the outcome.

tasks.title: Corruptible Crowd Modes
tasks.description: Introduces game modes or periodic events where the base cost of bribing the crowd fluctuates dynamically based on 'Corruptibility Level', encouraging players to strategically time their bribes to cheaply cancel hazards or overwhelm enemies.

tasks.title: Weather prediction tool booster
tasks.description: Add a new booster that predicts the next weather condition accurately and gives the capturing player an aura buff when the predicted weather starts.

tasks.title: Altar Sabotage Mechanic
tasks.description: Players can drop negative modifiers onto altars instead of just capturing them. When an altar is sabotaged, it deals tick damage to the other team attempting to capture it.

tasks.title: Teleport Anchor Traps
tasks.description: Introduce a new player-deployable trap called the 'Anchor Trap'. When an enemy ball enters the trap's radius, their movement abilities (like dash or teleport) are completely disabled for 5 seconds, effectively rooting them in the general area and disabling escape mechanics.

tasks.title: Gravity Wells Hazard
tasks.description: Invisible gravity wells spawn randomly in the arena. If a player approaches within a certain radius, they are pulled towards the center, altering their movement vector continuously.

tasks.title: Time Loop Mode
tasks.description: Every 30 seconds, the game state (positions, health) rewinds to where it was 5 seconds ago, forcing players to rethink their strategies or re-engage.

tasks.title: Weather forecasting
tasks.description: Have a ball type that gets a prediction on what weather might come next.

tasks.title: Weather specific events
tasks.description: Have specific small weather events, like small rain, slight breeze, rather than just extreme weather. Have specific balls that benefit from certain weather, like a sandstorm element giving speed boost, or wind element being blown away by hurricane.

tasks.title: New Ball Type: Botanist
tasks.description: A ball type that plants seeds around the arena which grow into tall grass or temporary healing fruits over time. The Botanist gains camouflage while in tall grass and its basic attacks apply a slowing vines effect.

tasks.title: New Game Mode: Toxic Flood
tasks.description: A variation of the standard battle royale where the safe zone isn't a shrinking circle, but rather elevated platforms. The floor periodically floods with poison, forcing all players to fight for control of the limited high ground platforms before the flood recedes.

tasks.title: Kinetic Reversal Booster
tasks.description: A new active skill/booster that temporarily stores all incoming kinetic energy (push and pull forces) into a charge meter. When full or upon expiration, it releases the accumulated force in a massive radial shockwave, pushing away all nearby hazards and enemies.

tasks.title: Debris Repulsor Mod
tasks.description: A new hazard modifier that causes orbital debris to push balls away continuously rather than just slowing them down, making the crater area extremely slippery and harder to navigate for any balls trying to find cover.

tasks.title: Quantum Teleport Mutator
tasks.description: A new mutator for balls where their dash skill is replaced by a short-range instantaneous teleport, which can pass through thin walls but has a longer cooldown.

tasks.title: Blackout Traps
tasks.description: Introduce a new trap that, when triggered, heavily reduces the vision range of the ball for a few seconds, forcing them into a disadvantageous position in team fights.

tasks.title: Slime Bounce Pads
tasks.description: Hazard objects that apply a large velocity impulse in the opposite direction of approach when a ball touches them, but cover them in slime (speed debuff) for 3 seconds.

tasks.title: Slime Monster Boss
tasks.description: A boss that shoots out balls of slime. It leaves a massive trail of slime behind it, slowing down everyone who gets too close to its tail. When destroyed, splits into two smaller, faster slimes.

tasks.title: Chain Reaction Booster
tasks.description: Increases the max number of chain lightning bounces by 1 but reduces initial damage by 15%.

tasks.title: Quantum Mirror Boundaries
tasks.description: An arena mode where hitting a map boundary doesn't just bounce you, but teleports you to the opposite side of the map with inverted velocity.

tasks.title: Dynamically Rising Lava Floor
tasks.description: The arena is composed of various elevated platforms. Over time, lava rises from the bottom of the screen, permanently destroying the lowest platforms and forcing players to constantly fight for high ground.

tasks.title: Rubber Band Arena
tasks.description: A mutator where pairs of players are tethered together by an elastic band. If they move too far apart, they are snapped back towards each other, dealing collision damage.

tasks.title: Sticky Bomb Trap
tasks.description: A new trap type that attaches to the first ball that touches it and detonates after 3 seconds, damaging them and nearby players. Can be passed to another player by colliding with them before detonation.

tasks.title: Quantum Dash
tasks.description: Modify the dash to briefly put the ball in a 'quantum state', making it immune to collisions and hazards during the teleport transition. After teleporting, it leaves behind a decoy that explodes if touched by enemies.

tasks.title: Chain Teleport
tasks.description: Instead of a single teleport dash, the ball can teleport up to 3 times in quick succession if enemies are clustered within a small radius. Each subsequent jump deals slightly less damage but refreshes a minor stamina burst.

tasks.title: Quantum Tunnels
tasks.description: Portals that appear randomly and teleport balls instantly across the map. Teleporting resets velocity and can lead to strategic advantages or sudden death traps if leading into hazards.

tasks.title: Acid Rain Event
tasks.description: Periodically during battle royale matches, acid rain falls globally, applying a small DOT (damage over time) to all balls. Shields mitigate the effect, encouraging players to seek out shield boosters or specific shelter zones.

tasks.title: Thawing Environment
tasks.description: A variant where the arena has dynamic heat zones. Instead of relying purely on allies to unfreeze them, frozen players slowly thaw when pushed into a heat zone. However, if they are pushed into a frost zone, they become permanently shattered if they take any damage.

tasks.title: Bouncy Borders Mode
tasks.description: Arena walls become extremely bouncy. Colliding with a wall reflects balls at 2x speed, turning the arena into a chaotic pinball machine.

tasks.title: Ghost Sabotage Mode
tasks.description: Dead players become ghosts. They cannot deal damage directly but can slightly push hazards and boosters around to help or hinder surviving players.

tasks.title: Reverse Freeze Tag
tasks.description: A mutator or variant of Freeze Tag where everyone starts frozen, and there is one 'Healer' per team. The healers must dodge hazards and quickly unfreeze their entire team before the other healer does.

tasks.title: Interactive Twitch Hazard Controls
tasks.description: Allow real spectators via the Twitch integration to not only trigger votes, but actively control specific neutral hazards for brief periods (e.g., directing a meteor strike or moving a poison cloud).

tasks.title: Audience Favor System
tasks.description: Balls accumulate an 'Audience Favor' score. High favor grants reduced cooldowns or passive healing, while very low favor results in being targeted more frequently by crowd-thrown hazards. Favor goes up from multi-kills or comebacks.

tasks.title: Mirage Terrain Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard zone that visually mimics a safe area or a beneficial spring but reveals its true damaging nature only when a player steps into it.

tasks.title: Crumbling Arena Walls
tasks.description: Wall damage isn't just applied to the players, but also to the arena. Hard wall impacts break pieces off the boundary, expanding the hazard zone inwards and making the playable area more dangerous over time.

tasks.title: Wall Jump Mastery Mutator
tasks.description: A game mode mutator where balls are forced to move continuously but taking damage from walls is disabled. Hitting walls instead provides massive momentum boosts and recharges dash abilities, encouraging a pinball-like playstyle.

tasks.title: Low Gravity Zone Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard that applies a low-gravity effect to balls within it, reducing their friction, altering movement speed unexpectedly, and increasing the distance they bounce off walls.

tasks.title: Decoy Mirror Match Event
tasks.description: An event that randomly spawns stationary decoys of every alive ball on the map that mimics their current appearance to cause confusion during team fights.

tasks.title: Quantum Swap Token
tasks.description: A rare collectable item that allows a player to instantly swap positions with a targeted enemy or ally, confusing opponents and enabling strategic repositioning.

tasks.title: Aegis Reflection Shield
tasks.description: A temporary booster that not only absorbs all incoming projectile and skill damage but also reflects 50% of it back to the original attacker.

tasks.title: Adaptive Power-Up Pools
tasks.description: When boosters spawn in specific hazard zones (e.g., inside a mud pit or a flood zone), they mutate into specialized variants that not only provide their core power but also impart a temporary environmental immunity or buff, like a 'muddy' booster giving minor speed buffs on dirt but slowing down on normal terrain.

tasks.title: Hyperdrive Vortex
tasks.description: If an entity maintains Speed Overdrive for more than 10 seconds, it generates a mini vortex that temporarily pulls in nearby hazards and destroys them, creating a path for the player.

tasks.title: Doppelganger Elite Hazard
tasks.description: A rare elite hazard that roams the map. When it spots a player, it perfectly mimics their stats, buffs, and loadout for 30 seconds. Players must either outrun their own doppelganger or fight an equally matched AI mirror.

tasks.title: Kinetic Discharge
tasks.description: Entities with Speed Overdrive deal bonus damage based on their current speed when colliding with enemies, converting speed into kinetic burst damage.

tasks.title: Danger zone ping system
tasks.description: Add a minimap UI ping when the safe zone shrinks. A red flash could indicate a ball is currently taking damage from being outside the zone.

tasks.title: Zoning tools
tasks.description: A new booster that allows players to create temporary safe zones outside the main circle, encouraging tactical setups for flanking or sniping.

tasks.title: Aura of Repulsion Booster
tasks.description: When picked up, this booster grants a temporary aura that forcefully pushes away incoming hazards and projectiles, protecting the ball but also potentially pushing hazards toward allies.

tasks.title: Bouncy Bullet Booster
tasks.description: A booster that modifies standard ranged attacks so they bounce off walls multiple times, retaining their damage properties, effectively turning the arena into a pinball machine of projectiles.

tasks.title: Portal Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where pairs of connected portals spawn periodically. Shooting a portal transfers attacks to the other portal, and balls can teleport through them to escape or ambush enemies.

tasks.title: Juggernaut Buff
tasks.description: A rare booster drop that massively increases size, health, and mass, but reduces speed. The juggernaut can push hazards into enemies easily.

tasks.title: Bounty Trap
tasks.description: A deployable trap that, when triggered, temporarily turns the victim into a high-threat bounty target for all bounty hunters on the map.

tasks.title: Bounty Hunter Contract Extension
tasks.description: An item that extends the time a target is marked as a bounty, or instantly resets their bounty indicator if they go into stealth.

tasks.title: Shattering Ice Walls Modifier
tasks.description: An arena modifier where walls are made of ice. Hitting the walls at high speed causes them to shatter, temporarily removing the boundary and creating a perilous drop-off zone, but the ice slowly regenerates over time.

tasks.title: Whirlpool Traps
tasks.description: In water-themed arenas, Whirlpools can spawn that slowly suck entities towards the center, reducing movement speed. Entities that reach the center are briefly slowed down or submerge before resurfacing, dropping some HP or receiving a wet debuff.

tasks.title: Lightning Rod Hazard
tasks.description: A new deployable hazard that acts as a Lightning Rod, attracting any stray lightning bolts towards it and shielding nearby allies. When fully charged, it unleashes a small localized shockwave that stuns nearby enemies.

tasks.title: Guild Headquarters Decor
tasks.description: Unlockable cosmetics and interactive decor items that clannies can place in their clan's custom pre-game lobby/headquarters, obtained by ranking high in Clan Tournaments.

tasks.title: Clan Daily Quests
tasks.description: Quests that provide shared rewards and contribute to clan goals, incentivizing playing together and increasing engagement.

tasks.title: Random Boss Invasions
tasks.description: Periodically spawn a massive boss entity (e.g. 'The Behemoth') during Battle Royale matches that drops legendary items when defeated. If players fail to defeat it within a certain time, it explodes, wiping out a huge portion of the arena.

tasks.title: Reverse Time Altar
tasks.description: An altar that, when captured by a team, rewinds the positions and health of all enemy balls by 5 seconds, allowing the capturing team to regain a lost advantage or punish an aggressive push.

tasks.title: Phantom Hazard - Poltergeist
tasks.description: A new hazard type that is invisible most of the time but occasionally materializes to grab a nearby entity, applying a root and minor damage over time. It forces players to pay attention to small environmental cues like floating debris before it strikes.

tasks.title: Slingshot Hook Mechanic
tasks.description: Add a new skill where the ball shoots a grappling hook to an ally or a piece of the environment, rapidly pulling itself towards it to avoid danger or reposition.

tasks.title: Black Ice Weather Hazard
tasks.description: A weather type or hazard zone that significantly drops steering capabilities (e.g. steering_mult = 0.1) and applies constant slide physics where the ball can't brake effectively, making arena navigation chaotic.

tasks.title: Bouncy Bullet Mutator
tasks.description: A weekly mutator where all projectiles (bullets, fireballs, snipes) bounce off walls and hazards up to 3 times before dissipating. This creates a chaotic bullet-hell environment, rewarding players with strong defensive skills and positional awareness.

tasks.title: Weather Fusion Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where capturing altars of different weather types combines their effects. For example, triggering Rain and Heatwave simultaneously creates a 'Steam' weather condition that obscures vision globally while continuously draining stamina.

tasks.title: Gravitational Slingshot Booster
tasks.description: A consumable booster that allows the player to briefly alter their own gravitational field. When activated near a heavy hazard like a black hole or dense planetoid, the player's momentum is multiplied immensely, allowing them to rapidly flank enemies or escape dangerous shrinking safe zones at incredible speeds.

tasks.title: Bribe Auction System
tasks.description: If multiple players attempt to bribe the same vote event, a short auction is triggered where players bid currency to secure the final decision.

tasks.title: Vote Streaks Multiplier
tasks.description: Viewers get increased voting power when they vote on multiple consecutive options, encouraging consistent chat engagement.

tasks.title: Stamina Overflow State
tasks.description: If a ball maintains max stamina for 5 continuous seconds, they enter an Overflow state, granting them 20% increased speed and slightly reduced incoming damage until stamina drops below 80%.

tasks.title: Bouncing Laser Hazard
tasks.description: A laser beam hazard that bounces off the arena walls up to a certain number of times, causing a grid of unpredictable danger zones for players.

tasks.title: Aura Clashes
tasks.description: When two balls with high-level cosmetic auras (scale >= 2.0) collide, they trigger an 'Aura Clash' shockwave. This shockwave deals no damage but heavily knocks back all nearby entities (including hazards and smaller balls), temporarily silencing them for 2 seconds.

tasks.title: Emotion Synergy: Courage
tasks.description: Introduce a new emotion 'courage' that can randomly proc on balls that successfully defeat an enemy that was under the 'fear' effect. Courage grants immunity to fear and a 15% bonus to attack power for 10 seconds.

tasks.title: Aura Harmony Bonus
tasks.description: When balls with the same cosmetic aura color stay near each other without colliding, their aura intensity scales up and provides a passive healing buff to both players. If they collide, it triggers the elemental explosion instead.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zones With Multiple Biomes
tasks.description: Each shrinking safe zone acts as a unique biome, granting different passive abilities, allowing for multiple tactical advantages.

tasks.title: Quantum Tunnels Mechanics
tasks.description: Adding random quantum tunnels that instantly teleport a ball to the opposite side of the map with inverted velocity.

tasks.title: Decoy Swap Module
tasks.description: A new skill or booster item where activating it allows the player to instantly swap positions with their most recently deployed decoy, consuming the decoy in the process and detonating it at the player's old position.

tasks.title: Prismatic Aura Boss
tasks.description: A new boss ball type that rapidly cycles through aura colors. Hitting the boss while its aura matches your own heals you instead of damaging the boss, making timing crucial for takedowns.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Trait
tasks.description: A rare starting trait where two players are quantum entangled. Whatever damage or healing one receives, the other receives 50% of it. However, if one player is eliminated, the other gains a massive permanent speed and damage boost (Enraged State).

tasks.title: Orbital Laser Strike Event
tasks.description: Periodically, a massive orbital laser targets the player with the highest score. It takes 3 seconds to lock on, providing a visible warning beam. When it fires, it leaves a scorched earth trail that heavily slows and slightly damages any balls moving through it.

tasks.title: Weather Radar Item
tasks.description: A new booster/consumable item that reveals the next upcoming weather pattern 10 seconds before it activates, allowing players to find a safe zone or adjust their strategies (e.g., getting away from high friction zones before rain starts).

tasks.title: Season-based Weather Mutators
tasks.description: Introduce global modifiers to matches based on ongoing seasons. For example, during 'Winter Season', snow and blizzard weather states appear much more frequently, providing a buff to certain cosmetic skins (like snow tires) globally.

tasks.title: Quantum Relay Booster
tasks.description: A booster that allows a ball to place a temporary quantum relay beacon. Upon taking fatal damage, the ball is instead teleported to the beacon with 20% health, consuming the relay.

tasks.title: Kinetic Deflector Arena Hazard
tasks.description: An arena hazard that absorbs all kinetic energy from high-speed collisions and charges up. Once fully charged, it unleashes a massive shockwave that pushes all entities away and damages shields.

tasks.title: Emotion Status Interactions
tasks.description: Expand the emotion system so that emotions interact with specific hazards and mechanics. For example, 'fear' makes balls run slightly faster but lose turning radius, while 'anger' increases damage dealt but reduces defense. Balls with 'calm' are immune to sudden stat changes.

tasks.title: Cosmetic Synergy
tasks.description: Introduce cosmetic synergies where balls that wear matching cosmetics (e.g., all wearing 'sunglasses') gain a passive team bonus, encouraging teams to coordinate their aesthetic for a small competitive edge.

tasks.title: Aura Combination Evolutions
tasks.description: When balls with different colored auras collide, instead of just an explosion, there's a small chance their auras combine to create a rare 'hybrid' aura color that grants both base aura effects for a short duration.

tasks.title: Aura Resonance Shields
tasks.description: Balls with matching aura colors generate a temporary shield when they collide or stay in close proximity, encouraging players to cluster same-aura units for defense.

tasks.title: Guild Perks system
tasks.description: Expand the guild system to include unlockable perks using guild points. For example, members might gain +5% max HP or improved drop rates for crafting materials if the guild reaches a certain level.

tasks.title: Guild-Exclusive Weather Events
tasks.description: Implement special weather modifiers (like 'Guild Storm') that can be triggered in Battle Royale using pooled guild resources, providing an advantage or specific status effects to participating guild members.

tasks.title: Aura of Paranoia
tasks.description: A new hazard type that applies the 'confusion' effect to any ball that stays within it for more than 3 seconds, forcing players to navigate quickly through the zone or risk reversing their controls.

tasks.title: Necromancer Grave Traps
tasks.description: When a Necromancer dies, they leave behind a 'Grave Trap' hazard that explodes into bone fragments, damaging and slowing nearby enemies who step on it.

tasks.title: Guild Headquarters Customization Interface
tasks.description: Add an interactive visual headquarters for guilds where unlocked cosmetics, statues, and banners can be arranged. Members can visit their HQ to see top contributors featured in the hall of fame.

tasks.title: Minion Devour Mechanic
tasks.description: A new skill for the Necromancer: 'Devour'. The Necromancer consumes a target allied minion to instantly restore a large amount of HP and gain temporary damage immunity.

tasks.title: Weather Altars in Standard Battle Royale
tasks.description: Add altars from WeatherChaosMode to the standard Battle Royale game mode. Capturing an altar would temporarily grant map-wide weather effects such as a blizzard slowing enemy movement or a heatwave causing damage over time.

tasks.title: Cursed Currency Mode
tasks.description: Instead of picking up generic boosters, currency pickups now act as both a resource and a burden. The more currency a ball holds, the slower their base speed becomes and their hitbox gets slightly larger, but they deal more damage. Players can deposit this currency at scattered altars (similar to Black Markets) to buy permanent buffs and shed the debuffs, creating a risk-reward dynamic.

tasks.title: Ball Customization Skins
tasks.description: Allow players to purchase and equip different cosmetic skins for their balls using prestige tokens or skill points, changing their visual appearance without affecting stats.

tasks.title: Custom Boss Spawns
tasks.description: Allow viewers to use channel points or specific actions to trigger the spawning of special bosses (like the Juggernaut) dynamically during the match.

tasks.title: Mutator Token Daily Quest
tasks.description: Add a difficult daily quest that rewards mutator tokens, creating an alternative to buying them, which makes voting more accessible for free-to-play players.

tasks.title: Spectral Escort
tasks.description: A VIP protection mode where one randomly selected ball on each team becomes the Spectral VIP. The VIP cannot attack and is highly vulnerable, but emits a constant healing aura for their teammates. The objective is to keep your VIP alive while hunting down the enemy VIP.

tasks.title: Chain Reaction Elementals
tasks.description: A game mode where elemental attacks trigger chain reactions. Hitting a burning ball with a water attack creates a massive steam explosion that blinds everyone nearby, while hitting a frozen ball with a fire attack instantly shatters their ice for massive burst damage.

tasks.title: Guild Mutator Votes
tasks.description: Allow guilds to pool their mutator tokens together to heavily influence the mutator of guild-versus-guild matches.

tasks.title: Shrinking Arenas Mechanic
tasks.description: Different quadrants of the arena have their own shrinking mechanic, forcing players to navigate moving safe zones or jump through portals to reach safer quadrants.

tasks.title: Lava Eruption Mode
tasks.description: An arena modification where random sections of the floor erupt into lava geysers, forcing balls to traverse via specific safe paths while increasing their temperature (friction) if they stay near the geysers.

tasks.title: Collapsing Ceiling Hazard
tasks.description: Instead of dropping panels from below, introduce a collapsing ceiling that shrinks the vertical height in safe zones. Balls caught under falling debris are briefly stunned and take massive damage.

tasks.title: Platform Tilt Mechanics
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic platform tilting where sections of the arena slightly slope over time, causing balls to drift slowly towards the edge or center. This forces players to continuously correct their position.

tasks.title: Volcanic Eruption Mutator
tasks.description: A global event that causes the center of the arena to periodically erupt, showering random locations across the map with burning projectiles that leave lingering lava puddles. Provides chaotic area denial.

tasks.title: Shrinking Grid Mode
tasks.description: A battle royale variant where the arena is made up of a grid of tiles. Every few seconds, some tiles light up and then fall away, turning into bottomless pits. Players must constantly fight for position on the remaining tiles.

tasks.title: Necromancer Minion Sacrifice
tasks.description: Allow Necromancers to sacrifice their active minions to instantly heal themselves or gain a temporary shield, giving them an escape option when pressured.

tasks.title: Soul Collector Trait
tasks.description: Introduce a trait where other ball types can also drop smaller soul fragments on death that temporarily boost the stats of anyone who collects them, promoting aggressive play.

tasks.title: Quantum Mirage Booster
tasks.description: A new booster that, when picked up, gives the player a temporary ability to create stationary illusory copies of themselves every few seconds. These mirages deceive enemies and detonate into a small EMP when an enemy touches them or attacks them.

tasks.title: Corrosive Acid Trap
tasks.description: A deployable hazard item that leaves a puddle of acid on the ground. Any ball moving through the puddle receives a stacking damage-over-time debuff that reduces their maximum speed and slowly eats away at their health for several seconds.

tasks.title: Cosmic Anomaly Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where the arena gravity occasionally shifts, pulling balls towards the edges or a random point instead of the center. High-prestige players can deploy 'gravity anchors' to resist the effect.

tasks.title: Sticky Mine Trap
tasks.description: A throwable mine that latches onto the first ball it hits. It doesn't slow them down but ticks down an explosion timer, forcing them to run away from allies before it goes off.

tasks.title: Chain Reaction Bombs
tasks.description: Bombs that, when exploded, will trigger the immediate explosion of any other bombs in their blast radius, allowing for massive field-clearing chain reactions.

tasks.title: Solar Wind Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard that blows continuously in one direction across the arena, randomly shifting angles every 30 seconds. Balls pushed off the edge of the arena by this wind take massive radiation damage.

tasks.title: Quantum Leap Padding
tasks.description: A new booster that grants the ball a temporary 'Quantum Leap' state. When falling below 20% HP, the ball automatically teleports to the location of the nearest decoy or friendly drone instead of taking fatal damage, consuming the decoy in the process.

tasks.title: Magnetic Grapple Loadout
tasks.description: A new loadout trait that allows players to aim at walls or bumpers and rapidly pull themselves toward the object, providing extreme mobility and new angles of attack, at the cost of being vulnerable to intercepting projectiles.

tasks.title: Volcanic Eruption Event
tasks.description: During a 'Heatwave' weather event, volcanoes randomly erupt, launching fireballs across the arena. Fireballs leave temporary magma puddles on impact that deal high damage over time.

tasks.title: Necromancer Phylactery Mechanism
tasks.description: Introduce a rare 'Phylactery' drop for the Necromancer. When destroyed, instead of dying, the Necromancer's soul is bound to the Phylactery (which remains stationary for 5 seconds). If the Phylactery is not destroyed within that window, the Necromancer respawns with 50% HP.

tasks.title: Blizzard Visibility Reduction
tasks.description: During 'Blizzard' weather events, the camera zoom increases and fog of war is added, significantly reducing visibility. Additionally, entities leave temporary footprints in the snow.

tasks.title: Skeletal Archers Minions
tasks.description: Add a new subtype of minion for the Necromancer: Skeletal Archers. Unlike standard melee minions, these are fragile but can attack enemies from a distance using weak homing projectiles.

tasks.title: Mirage Decoy Mode
tasks.description: A new hazard/item that when collected spawns 3 fragile, AI-controlled holograms of the player that scatter in random directions. The holograms deal no damage but will detonate into a flashbang effect when destroyed, blinding nearby enemies and masking the real player's escape.

tasks.title: Reverse Lava Spread
tasks.description: After the lava fully expands, it slowly recedes back to the center, creating safe zones that can emerge unexpectedly.

tasks.title: Quantum Tethers
tasks.description: Players can deploy a quantum tether that attaches to an enemy ball. For the next 5 seconds, any knockback or damage taken by the player is partially shared with the tethered enemy. If the enemy moves too far away, the tether violently snaps, causing significant damage and stunning both balls briefly.

tasks.title: Artifact Combination System
tasks.description: Allow players to collect artifact fragments during battle. Gathering three matching fragments combines them into a single powerful artifact (like Aegis Shield or Hermes Boots) that gives unique passives and an active ability, independent of the ball's base skill.

tasks.title: Evolving Boss Encounters
tasks.description: Introduce AI bosses in the arena that evolve if left undefeated. Each time the safe zone shrinks, the boss gains a new random mutator (e.g., explosive aura, increased speed, or pulling gravity), turning it into a high-risk, high-reward target that drops multiple prestige tokens and rare artifacts when defeated.

tasks.title: Lava Eruption Warning
tasks.description: Small pools of lava randomly bubble up on the safe platforms, forcing players to constantly adjust their positioning even when on seemingly safe ground.

tasks.title: Grapple Hook Momentum Swing
tasks.description: Enhance the grapple hook logic to allow players to use it to swing around hazards or corners, conserving momentum for a speed boost upon release, instead of just pulling them straight towards the target.

tasks.title: Necromancer Lich Evolution
tasks.description: If a Necromancer survives for 60 seconds without taking any damage, it evolves into a Lich. A Lich's minions are permanently enraged and it can summon 2 skeletal dragons that have a ranged breath attack.

tasks.title: Minion Explosive Demise
tasks.description: When an enraged minion's HP drops to 0 due to rapid decay, it explodes in a small area of effect, dealing damage based on its maximum health to any enemies nearby.

tasks.title: Decoy Illusionist Skill
tasks.description: A new skill or ball type that specializes in spawning multiple low-HP decoys that mirror its movements. These decoys explode when hit by an enemy, dealing minor damage, making the true ball harder to track in chaotic fights.

tasks.title: Inverted Controls Status Effect
tasks.description: Add a new status effect called 'confusion' that randomly reverses the directional inputs or movement outputs of a ball for a few seconds. This can be inflicted by a new trap variant or a specific booster to add chaos to the battlefield.

tasks.title: Aura Resonance Event
tasks.description: A random game event where stacking auras pulse outward globally every 15 seconds. During a pulse, all players with active aura buffs grant those buffs to random friendly players anywhere on the map for 5 seconds. If a player with a reversed aura (via the Aura Inverter Trap) pulses, it debuffs enemies map-wide instead.

tasks.title: Aura Amplify Trap
tasks.description: A placeable trap that temporarily supercharges any active friendly stacking auras in its blast radius, doubling their effects and range for a short duration while dealing minor damage to enemies. This encourages teams to strategically defend the trap to maximize their buffs during engagements.

tasks.title: Chameleon Ball Type
tasks.description: A new ball type that automatically adopts the primary trait of the last enemy it damaged, switching playstyles dynamically during combat.

tasks.title: Chrono Shift Ability
tasks.description: A new ability that allows a ball to 'rewind' its position and health to its state 3 seconds prior. Can be used tactically to dodge incoming anomalous projectiles or recover from a bad positioning.

tasks.title: Pet System
tasks.description: Allow players to find, tame, and equip mini-balls as pets that follow them around, providing minor stat boosts or utility skills like auto-looting.

tasks.title: Guild Territories
tasks.description: Introduce a persistent world map where clans and guilds can battle for control over different zones, gaining passive resource buffs based on controlled territories.

tasks.title: Trickster Mirror Match Event
tasks.description: An arena event where all players are turned into Tricksters for 30 seconds.

tasks.title: Confetti Bomb Trap
tasks.description: A deployable hazard that deals zero damage but heavily obscures vision by spawning massive amounts of confetti particles when triggered.

tasks.title: Nemesis Revival Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where dying doesn't instantly eliminate you, but spawns you as a weaker 'Ghost Ball' connected to your killer. To revive fully, you must assist your killer in defeating another player or deal enough chip damage to break your ghostly tether.

tasks.title: Bounty Hunter Contracts
tasks.description: Players can spend prestige tokens or skill points at the start of a match to place a high-value contract on a specific enemy player. If they successfully eliminate that target, they receive triple the investment back. If another player claims the kill, they get a portion of the reward.

tasks.title: Weather System: Monsoons
tasks.description: Introduce a monsoon weather event that occasionally triggers during matches. When active, it reduces visibility similar to fog but also dynamically spawns temporary mud puddles and expands existing water bodies across the map. This forces players to adapt their movement paths continuously throughout the match.

tasks.title: Sticky Tar Traps
tasks.description: A new deployable hazard that acts similarly to mud puddles but is triggered by proximity. Once a player steps on it, their speed is drastically reduced and they take a small amount of continuous damage. This makes map control highly dynamic as players can strategically place these traps to counter fast-moving builds.

tasks.title: Chrono-Stasis Field
tasks.description: An area-of-effect skill or deployable device that creates a large temporal bubble. Entities inside the bubble have their movement speed, projectile speed, and attack speed reduced to 10% of normal, but they also take 50% less damage from all sources while inside the zone.

tasks.title: Shrinking Arena Mod
tasks.description: Every 30 seconds the arena size is reduced by 10%, forcing players into closer combat.

tasks.title: Sticky Wall Hazard
tasks.description: Players that run into this wall get their speed reduced by 50% for 3 seconds.

tasks.title: Decoy payloads
tasks.description: In Escort mode, Defenders can deploy a decoy payload that travels along an alternate path. The decoy distracts Attackers and draws automated hazards, but it does not count towards winning.

tasks.title: Sabotage the payload
tasks.description: In Escort mode, Attackers can now attack the payload directly to slow it down or temporarily disable its movement if enough damage is dealt within a short time window.

tasks.title: Solar Flare Event
tasks.description: A random arena-wide event that temporarily disables all deployable items and boosts, forcing players to rely entirely on core movement and positioning.

tasks.title: Quantum Tunneling Booster
tasks.description: A booster that allows the ball to phase through solid hazards like walls or rocks for a brief duration, enabling surprise attacks or escapes.

tasks.title: Pinball Bumpers Mode
tasks.description: Arena is filled with multiple massive pinball bumpers. Touching a bumper reflects the ball with high speed. Boosters spawn near the bumpers.

tasks.title: Black Hole Slingshot Mutator
tasks.description: Black holes periodically appear and pull players in, but if a player uses a dash skill when near the event horizon, they gain a massive speed boost in the direction of their dash.

tasks.title: Reverse Tether Hook
tasks.description: A new booster that when activated, instead of pulling you to the target, it pulls the target to you.

tasks.title: Chain Grapple
tasks.description: Grappling hook now chains to a second target automatically if one is in range when the first target is hit.

tasks.title: Lava Eruption Event
tasks.description: A random event that periodically erupts lava fountains from the ground, leaving damaging puddles that players must navigate around during combat.

tasks.title: Reverse Lava Mode
tasks.description: A battle royale variation where the center is lava and expands outwards, forcing players to eventually fight on the very edges of the map while dodging environmental hazards.

tasks.title: Time dilation trap
tasks.description: A trap that dramatically slows down the time for the ball that triggered it, causing them to move and attack in slow motion for a few seconds.

tasks.title: Quantum Swap Booster
tasks.description: A booster that swaps the positions of the ball and the furthest enemy currently alive when picked up, instantly turning the tables or changing combat positioning.

tasks.title: Trail of Fire Trap
tasks.description: A trap item that leaves a burning trail on the ground where the ball moves for the next 10 seconds. Enemies walking into the trail take continuous burn damage.

tasks.title: Nemesis Faction Alliances
tasks.description: Players can pledge loyalty to their Nemesis, becoming an 'Enforcer' for them. As an Enforcer, the player gets a buff when fighting their Nemesis's enemies but receives a massive debuff if they accidentally damage the Nemesis themselves.

tasks.title: Seasonal Weather Hazards
tasks.description: Each season could introduce a specific weather hazard dynamically into the arena. For example, 'Abyssal' could spawn whirlpools that pull balls in, and 'Inferno' could occasionally drop meteors that deal AoE damage.

tasks.title: Quantum Teleportation Relay
tasks.description: A deployable structure (similar to a hazard) that allows balls to instantly teleport between two paired relays on the map. This introduces new strategic positioning and ambush opportunities, especially in larger or compartmentalized arenas.

tasks.title: Aura Vacuum Mode
tasks.description: A gamemode where friendly auras no longer passively apply to teammates. Instead, nearby enemies 'siphon' your team's auras, stealing the speed and damage buffs for themselves.

tasks.title: Aura Bomb Event
tasks.description: An event where random players are given a ticking 'Aura Bomb'. They must rush away from their teammates to avoid wiping them out in an aura explosion, but rushing towards enemies will damage them.

tasks.title: Shrinking Danger Zones Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where safe zones periodically spawn and shrink. Players outside the safe zone take increasing damage over time.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Path
tasks.description: A game mode where the safe zone isn't a circle, but rather a winding path (like a snake) that continuously moves and shrinks, forcing players to navigate narrow corridors.

tasks.title: Mutator Synergy Combinations
tasks.description: If players vote for two specific mutators that complement each other (e.g., '10x Speed' and 'Bouncy Walls'), the game combines them into a secret third mutator (e.g., 'Pinball Nightmare').

tasks.title: Reverse Gravity Zone
tasks.description: A game mutator where randomly a zone appears in the arena that pushes balls away from its center instead of pulling them, acting like a reverse black hole.

tasks.title: Weekend Boss Invasions
tasks.description: On weekends, there is a chance for a massive world boss to invade the standard battle royale map, forcing all remaining balls to temporarily ally against it before resuming their fight.

tasks.title: Hive Mind Game Mode
tasks.description: A new team-based game mode where each team has a central 'Hive' structure that must be protected. Teams must gather resources scattered across the map to upgrade their hive's defenses and spawn automated minions to assault the enemy hive.

tasks.title: Corruption Hazard Zones
tasks.description: Periodically, zones of corruption appear in the arena. Balls that stay in the corruption zone have their health drained, but they gain a temporary massive boost to attack damage and movement speed while inside, offering a high-risk, high-reward tactical element.

tasks.title: Quantum Leap Boots
tasks.description: A new booster that allows players to instantly teleport a short distance forward, bypassing hazards, walls, and other players, but with a high stamina cost per use.

tasks.title: Vampiric Aura Hazard
tasks.description: A new stationary hazard that slowly drains the HP of any player within its radius, but instead of just disappearing, it heals the closest player on the opposite team proportional to the damage dealt.

tasks.title: Supernova Mine
tasks.description: A high-risk mine variant that takes 5 seconds to detonate. It projects an expanding aura showing the blast radius. If it detonates, it deals massive damage in a huge area and pushes all balls across the map, applying a blind effect to those looking towards it. Enemies can defuse it by staying within its core for 2 seconds before it blows.

tasks.title: Guild Emblem In-game Display
tasks.description: Display the guild emblem near the player's ball or health bar during gameplay.

tasks.title: Guild Emblem Editor UI
tasks.description: Add a user interface in the main menu for players to easily edit their guild emblem visually.

tasks.title: Reverse Time Field Trap
tasks.description: A deployable hazard or trap that creates a localized field. When a ball enters the field, their movements, health changes, and stamina depletion are continuously reverted by a few seconds, confusing their targeting logic and undoing their progress or damage taken.

tasks.title: Shockwave Mine Trap
tasks.description: A deployable mine that detonates upon enemy contact, emitting a massive radial shockwave that deals low damage but pushes all enemies significantly far away and disables their movement abilities for 1.5 seconds.

tasks.title: Introduce Elemental Synergy Combos
tasks.description: When units with 'Fire' and 'Earth' traits interact, they could create a temporary 'Magma' field that slows and damages enemies. This encourages team compositions based on elemental synergies rather than just raw stats.

tasks.title: Dynamic Day/Night Cycle Influencing Traits
tasks.description: Implement a Day/Night cycle where 'Light' units gain increased perception radius and speed during the day, while 'Shadow' units gain stealth and critical hit chance during the night, adding another layer of dynamic trait mechanics.

tasks.title: Emote Combinations Synergy
tasks.description: When multiple spectators drop the same emote (e.g. 'cheer:firework') near each other simultaneously, the effects combine to form a massive graphical event on the arena to hype up the remaining players, granting small visual aura buffs to nearby survivors.

tasks.title: Interactive VIP Spectator Drops
tasks.description: Spectators with enough cheer points can vote on placing specific global hazard zones (e.g. low gravity) in the arena during downtime or specific phases of the battle, making them active participants in the game pacing.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Transfer
tasks.description: A new hazard that randomly swaps the positions and momentum of two entangled balls when one takes massive damage.

tasks.title: Season Highlight Replays integration
tasks.description: Store full game replays of the final matches of the top 10 players and allow them to be downloaded or watched in-game.

tasks.title: Bounty Hunter Disguise Skill
tasks.description: An active skill for the Bounty Hunter that temporarily hides their bounty target indicator from the enemy, while disguising themselves as a normal tier ball for 5 seconds to set up surprise attacks.

tasks.title: Decoy Bounties
tasks.description: A new hazard or mutator where fake bounty targets randomly spawn in the arena. They have the same visual indicator as a real bounty but explode into a cloud of smoke or poison when destroyed, punishing players who don't confirm their targets.

tasks.title: Entanglement Chain
tasks.description: A new mutator where entanglement can spread from two players to up to four if they remain in close proximity.

tasks.title: AI Highlight Commentary
tasks.description: Add text-to-speech commentary during highlight playback, analyzing the player's performance.

tasks.title: Weather Altar Traps
tasks.description: Traps disguised as capture altars that, when fully captured, trigger an opposite detrimental weather effect solely on the capturing team.

tasks.title: Mirror Ball
tasks.description: A ball type that passively reflects a percentage of damage taken back to the attacker.

tasks.title: Dynamic Weather Mutator - Flood
tasks.description: A rare weather event that gradually floods the arena with water. Balls that lack aquatic or floating traits will have their movement speed significantly reduced, and deep areas might cause continuous stamina drain.

tasks.title: Recoil-Powered Evasive Maneuver Skill
tasks.description: An active skill that fires a rapid burst of high-recoil blanks, generating intense backward thrust to quickly escape dangerous situations without damaging enemies.

tasks.title: Projectile Recoil Trajectory Modification Booster
tasks.description: A new booster that amplifies or dampens the recoil from ranged attacks, allowing players to fine-tune their evasion mechanics or minimize recoil for stable firing lines.

tasks.title: Shock Collar Traps
tasks.description: A new trap variant that latches onto the first ball that steps on it. Instead of exploding immediately, it periodically triggers a minor chain lightning effect to nearby teammates, turning the infected ball into a mobile hazard. It can be removed by picking up a cleansing item or if the infected ball takes enough damage.

tasks.title: Aura Syphoning Skill
