tasks.description: A new active skill that allows a ball to latch onto an enemy's positive buffs (like insulator, kinetic shield, or speed boost) and drain their remaining duration, converting it into health or applying the buff to themselves. If the target has no positive buffs, it deals direct damage instead.

tasks.title: Sniper Nest Spotter Drone
tasks.description: Balls in a sniper nest could periodically release a tiny spotter drone that orbits the nest, revealing the location of any enemies in an even larger radius to the sniper. The drone can be destroyed by enemies to deny vision.

tasks.title: Camouflage Net
tasks.description: An interactable item that can be placed over a sniper nest. It hides the visual indicator that normally marks the nest's occupant as a high-priority target, allowing for stealthy ambushes until the camouflage is blown away by explosives or wind.

tasks.title: Nemesis Reversal Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where dealing damage to your nemesis actually heals you instead, encouraging players to hunt down their rivals to sustain themselves in battle.

tasks.title: Nemesis Tracking Drone
tasks.description: A consumable item that spawns a drone that automatically flies towards your nemesis and periodically pings their location on the map with a sonar-like effect for 30 seconds.

tasks.title: Slingshot Arena Mode
tasks.description: An arena mode where walls apply a massive multiplying force to balls when they bounce off them, making the edges of the arena extremely dangerous due to high velocity ricochets.

tasks.title: Mirror World Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where the entire arena is horizontally symmetrical. Firing a projectile on the left side of the map simultaneously spawns a 'phantom' projectile on the right side traveling in the mirrored direction. Players have to watch both sides of the arena to dodge effectively.

tasks.title: Quantum Echo Trait
tasks.description: Balls with the Quantum Echo trait leave behind a faint ghost of their past position every 3 seconds. Pressing their active skill immediately teleports them back to their most recent ghost, resetting their health to whatever it was at that exact moment. A high-skill mobility and sustain option.

tasks.title: Aura Disruption Mode
tasks.description: A mode where collecting an aura pickup grants you an aura, but randomly disrupts (removes/disables) one of the enemies' auras, causing chaotic shifting of elemental advantages.

tasks.title: Aura Crafting Station
tasks.description: Instead of global random drops, specific hazard zones occasionally act as 'Crafting Stations' where you can deposit collected auras to purposefully trigger hybrid effects on demand.

tasks.title: Decoy Mimic Mastery
tasks.description: A new passive skill where decoys deployed by the player not only copy their appearance, but occasionally mimic casting harmless visual versions of their current active skill.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Mutator
tasks.description: A game mode mutator where all energy weapons and traps have a chance to chain to nearby secondary targets, causing chaotic team fights.

tasks.title: Grapple Hook Trap
tasks.description: A trap that shoots out a grappling hook when triggered, reeling the victim into the trap's center and rooting them for 2 seconds.

tasks.title: New mode 'Meteor Shower'
tasks.description: Periodically, meteors fall from the sky onto the arena, creating temporary craters that act as hazards, dealing damage and knocking back balls.

tasks.title: New loadout item 'Phase Boots'
tasks.description: Allows the ball to briefly ignore obstacles and hazards, moving through them without taking damage or being slowed down, but consumes stamina while active.

tasks.title: Magnetic Anchor Trap
tasks.description: A trap that greatly increases the gravity well effect on any enemy that steps on it, preventing them from dashing or being pushed for 3 seconds.

tasks.title: Stormcaller Ball Type
tasks.description: A new ball type that specializes in manipulating environmental hazards. Its primary skill allows it to spawn miniature tornados, and its passive ability grants it immunity to gravity wells and push/pull effects from hazards.

tasks.title: Arena Event: Quake
tasks.description: A periodic random event where the entire arena shakes. Balls without the 'grounded' status take minor continuous damage and suffer a severe speed penalty, forcing players to find safe zones or use specific defensive skills.

tasks.title: Prestige Roulette Minigame
tasks.description: A higher-stakes version of the spin wheel where players bet an amount of prestige tokens on colors or sections for a chance to win massive multipliers or exclusive 'Roulette Master' cosmetics.

tasks.title: Daily Token Scratchcards
tasks.description: Players receive one free scratchcard per day that guarantees a small reward, with a rare chance to unveil prestige tokens, encouraging daily logins beyond standard streaks.

tasks.title: Dynamic Hazard Evolution
tasks.description: Hazards can interact with the current seasonal theme. For example, a standard trap could freeze over during Frost season or catch fire during Inferno season, adding an extra layer of strategy.

tasks.title: Aura Syphon Field Trap
tasks.description: A trap that creates an aura siphon field. Any enemy caught inside has their positive aura buffs (speed, healing, etc.) constantly transferred to the trap owner, turning enemy team coordination into an advantage for the individual.

tasks.title: Corrosive Chain Reaction
tasks.description: A new skill that applies a corrosive debuff on a target. If the target dies while under the effect, it explodes and applies the debuff to all nearby enemies. Successive explosions deal increased damage.

tasks.title: Tesla Chain Trap
tasks.description: A player-deployable trap that connects to nearby traps to form a continuous electric beam that deals low damage but rapidly drains stamina.

tasks.title: EMP Overload
tasks.description: A new hazard that detonates and strips all buffs (like supercharge and overcharge) from enemies in the blast radius, but gives them a small speed burst for fleeing.

tasks.title: Kinetic Rebound Shield
tasks.description: A temporary shield that converts a portion of absorbed projectile damage into raw movement speed for a short duration.

tasks.title: Tornado Alley Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where the arena has multiple huge tornados slowly moving around, constantly sucking players in and dealing damage.

tasks.title: Day/Night Cycle Effect on Traits
tasks.description: Introduce a day/night cycle that dynamically affects traits. Nighttime could boost 'vampire' or 'stealth' traits, while daytime enhances 'solar' or 'radiant' units.

tasks.title: Synergistic Trait Combos
tasks.description: Create synergies when different traits are combined on the same team. For instance, pairing a 'water' trait unit with a 'lightning' trait unit triggers an 'electrified water' area of effect buff.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Enhancer Booster
tasks.description: A new booster that, when picked up, gives the player a temporary buff that makes their chain lightning jump an additional 2 times and deal 50% more damage to secondary targets.

tasks.title: Lightning Storm Arena Event
tasks.description: An arena event where chain lightning periodically strikes the center of the arena, and any entity caught in it becomes a conduit, rapidly spreading smaller, low-damage chain lightnings to anyone nearby for 10 seconds.

tasks.title: Black Hole Vacuum Item
tasks.description: A consumable item that drops a miniature black hole. It slowly pulls in hazards and projectiles, effectively clearing the area, before violently exploding and throwing all collected hazards back out in random directions.

tasks.title: Black Hole Weather
tasks.description: Weather event that slowly pulls everyone towards center.

tasks.title: Tornado Hazard that pulls balls in
tasks.description: Add a moving tornado hazard that pulls nearby balls towards its center, causing them to group up and take collision damage.

tasks.title: Trail Blazer Mutation
tasks.description: Mutator: All players move 2x faster when on their own team's color trail.

tasks.title: Ice Boots
tasks.description: Boots that ignore snow/ice

tasks.title: Weather-Adaptive Balls
tasks.description: Introduce new ball variants whose stats dynamically buff when specific weather events are active (e.g. Snowball gets faster during blizzards).

tasks.title: Bungee Cord Item
tasks.description: An item that attaches a player to a specific point on the map. They can move freely within a certain radius, but if they go too far or get knocked back, they are snapped back to the anchor point with high velocity.

tasks.title: Sticky Wall Pads
tasks.description: Boots or a passive item that allows a ball to stick to a wall for a few seconds when they hit it, preventing them from falling out of bounds and giving them a chance to aim a powerful jump off the wall.

tasks.title: Decoy Remote Detonator
tasks.description: Players can manually detonate their own decoys by pressing a specific button, allowing for strategic ambushes.

tasks.title: Elemental Decoys
tasks.description: Decoys can spawn with an element (fire, ice, lightning) which triggers a secondary status effect on explosion.

tasks.title: Windstorm event
tasks.description: Add a new Windstorm event that knocks all balls back.

tasks.title: Gravity Inversion Mutator
tasks.description: Periodically flips the gravity of the arena, sending heavy objects flying and altering player momentum.

tasks.title: Kinetic Absorber Skill
tasks.description: An active skill that absorbs a percentage of incoming kinetic knockback and converts it into a temporary speed boost or supercharge timer increase, allowing the ball to counter-attack aggressively after being struck.

tasks.title: Magnetic Boots Cosmetic Item
tasks.description: A cosmetic item that alters physical collisions by significantly reducing the knockback multiplier when a ball is hit by an attack, effectively rooting them or slowing their displacement in the arena.

tasks.title: Black Hole Center with Shrinking Safe Zone
tasks.description: A game mode where a black hole at the center of the arena slowly pulls all players inwards. The safe zone outside the black hole slowly shrinks over time. Players must constantly maneuver and fight each other while avoiding the ever-growing black hole.

tasks.title: Sticky web traps
tasks.description: New trap variant that slows balls within a web-like radius.

tasks.title: Reflect shield upgrade
tasks.description: Allow upgrading reflect shield duration via currency.

tasks.title: Guild Stronghold Upgrade
tasks.description: Winning territory battles grants a guild a 'Stronghold Upgrade'. They can fortify their base with better automated defenses, traps, or aura buffs for members while fighting in adjacent territories.

tasks.title: Thunderstorm Lightning Chain Damage
tasks.description: During thunderstorm weather events, lightning strikes could chain to nearby players if they are too close to the primary target, encouraging spacing out.

tasks.title: Weather Resistant Cosmetics
tasks.description: Introduce cosmetic items or specific ball types (like 'Ice Elemental') that are completely immune to certain localized weather hazards or even gain buffs from them.

tasks.title: Diplomacy/Alliance System
tasks.description: Guilds can form temporary alliances, sharing territory control and preventing friendly fire, but the alliance breaks when there are no neutral or enemy territories left to conquer.

tasks.title: Tornado Grenade
tasks.description: A deployable grenade that creates a temporary localized wind vortex, sucking in nearby balls and causing chaotic physics interactions.

tasks.title: Dynamic Bounty Targets based on Score
tasks.description: Introduce a system where the player or team with the highest score or highest streak automatically becomes a 'Bounty Target', visually highlighted on the map. Killing them grants bonus points and temporary buffs to the killer, encouraging dynamic comebacks.

tasks.title: Bounty Contracts Item
tasks.description: Add an equippable item or pickup called 'Bounty Contract' that temporarily selects a random enemy as a bounty. If the player eliminates that specific enemy within a time limit, they receive a massive payout of skill points and a unique permanent stat boost for the rest of the match.

tasks.title: Anti-Gravity Boots
tasks.description: An item that makes the ball float slightly, giving immunity to ground hazards like mud or spikes but increased knockback from attacks.

tasks.title: Dynamic Weather Events - Solar Flare
tasks.description: Introduce a random Solar Flare event during Day mode where sunlight beams intensify and all balls' max health is temporarily reduced if they step outside of shade or cover, forcing heavily tactical positioning.

tasks.title: New Hazard - Stalker Shadows
tasks.description: During the night cycle, AI-controlled shadow entities can spawn. They act as independent hazards that chase the nearest player, slowing them down on contact and slowly sapping stamina.

tasks.title: Decoy Distraction Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard zone that generates holographic decoys of nearby balls to distract enemy AI, making them attack holograms instead of real players.

tasks.title: Sunlight Reflector Hazard
tasks.description: A deployable hazard that can bounce active sunlight beams in new directions, creating dynamic, shifting danger zones during the day cycle.

tasks.title: Bounty Hunter Tracking Drone
tasks.description: Add a deployable tracking drone for Bounty Hunters that patrols the map, seeking out the current high-value bounty target and constantly revealing their location while the drone remains intact.

tasks.title: Stealth Camouflage Booster
tasks.description: A new temporary booster that grants complete invisibility on the minimap and makes the player transparent in the arena for 10 seconds, broken upon attacking or using an ability.

tasks.title: Mirror World
tasks.description: Creates a temporary mirror version of the map.

tasks.title: Decoy Decoy
tasks.description: Spawns a fake clone of a random teammate.

tasks.title: Sector Control Mode
tasks.description: Players capture sections of the map by remaining inside them. Captured sections periodically drop boosters or spawn defensive hazards against enemies.

tasks.title: Moving Walls Hazard
tasks.description: Random walls spawn and slowly move across the arena. Players must dodge them to avoid being crushed or taking damage.

tasks.title: Wind Tunnel Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard that blows a strong, concentrated gust of wind in one direction across the map. Balls entering it gain massive speed in that direction, which can be used to traverse quickly or escape bad situations, but can also fling them into traps.

tasks.title: Quantum Decay Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard zone that doesn't damage players directly, but rapidly drains their cooldown timers, making their abilities recharge much faster, at the cost of draining their current stamina or slightly slowing them down. It creates risk/reward spots on the map.

tasks.title: Chain Reaction Mines
tasks.description: A cluster of proximity mines that arm over 3 seconds. When one mine detonates, it triggers an explosion that forces nearby mines to detonate as well, creating a cascading blast effect that covers a huge area. Players can trigger it intentionally by throwing items or using ranged attacks.

tasks.title: Skill Morphing
tasks.description: If two projectable skills (like fireball and tornado) collide, they morph into a 'Firestorm' hazard that inherits properties of both and deals massive AOE damage.

tasks.title: Bouncing Projectiles
tasks.description: Skills like fireball can bounce off walls once before exploding, adding a tactical element where players can hit opponents around corners.

tasks.title: Bounty Hunter Progression
tasks.description: Players collect bounty tags from fallen enemies. Bringing bounty tags to safe extraction zones gives currency that can be spent on persistent upgrades during the match, rather than relying solely on random item drops.

tasks.title: Quantum Recall Beacon
tasks.description: Players can deploy a beacon that saves their current HP, shield state, and position. After 5 seconds, or upon reactivation, they are teleported back to the beacon and their state is restored. This allows for risky plays or escaping dangerous AoE zones like explosions.

tasks.title: Black Market Auction
tasks.description: Periodically during a match, a hidden item (like a legendary artifact) goes up for auction among alive players. They can bid the gold they have earned to win the item, causing a bidding war.

tasks.title: Kinetic Overload Mutator
tasks.description: A new mutator/buff that accumulates kinetic energy based on distance traveled. The more a player moves without stopping, the higher their next collision or attack damage becomes, culminating in an AoE kinetic blast if they maintain maximum speed for over 5 seconds.

tasks.title: Holographic Projection Item
tasks.description: An item that players can pick up and use to create a holographic copy of themselves that runs in a straight line, distracting AI enemies or drawing their fire for a few seconds.

tasks.title: Time Distortion Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard zone that sporadically slows down time for entities inside it but speeds up projectiles and hazards passing through it, forcing players to perfectly time their dodges.

tasks.title: Elemental Auras
tasks.description: Players can equip different elemental auras (fire, ice, lightning) that apply passive effects to nearby enemies or alter their own stats.

tasks.title: Mirror Match Event
tasks.description: An event that spawns identical clones of all players that mimic their inputs with a slight delay.

tasks.title: Black Hole Traps
tasks.description: Hazards that slowly suck in players within a certain radius, dealing no damage but making movement very difficult.

tasks.title: Geyser Jumping Boots
tasks.description: Add an item called 'Geyser Boots' that grants immunity to geyser damage and stun, but instead launches the player far across the map when standing on an erupting geyser.

tasks.title: Volcanic Fissures
tasks.description: Create a new arena hazard type called 'volcanic_fissure' that slowly opens up over time. Once fully opened, it deals continuous fire damage and creates a smokescreen effect, reducing visibility for players inside.

tasks.title: Moonlight Mirage Mode
tasks.description: During the night cycle, active moonlight shadows will occasionally spawn illusory copies of balls standing inside them. These 'Mirages' only take 1 damage to destroy but perfectly mimic the player's movements, confusing enemies and auto-targeting abilities.

tasks.title: Sun-Kissed Power-Up
tasks.description: Balls standing directly under a sunlight beam for exactly 2 seconds without a reflective shield become permanently 'Sun-Kissed'. This boosts their base speed by 10% and causes them to glow softly at night, granting slightly wider night vision at the cost of being highly visible to other players.

tasks.title: Trickster's Mirage Skill
tasks.description: An active skill for the trickster ball that creates three non-damaging illusions that run in different directions. Enemies attacking these illusions get a minor slow debuff, giving the trickster time to escape or counter-attack.

tasks.title: Phantom Spectator Intervention
tasks.description: Eliminated balls become 'Phantom Spectators' with limited ability to spawn minor hazards (like small ice patches) or toss tiny health packs to influence the match before it ends.

tasks.title: Boss Mutations per Tier
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic mutations for guild bosses that scale with tier. For example, a tier 2 boss might reflect 10% of damage, while a tier 3 boss might spawn minions periodically during the fight.

tasks.title: Guild Leaderboards for Boss Tiers
tasks.description: Add a new leaderboard that specifically tracks which guilds have cleared the highest tiers of guild bosses each week, rewarding the top 3 guilds with exclusive cosmetic auras.

tasks.title: Cross-Guild Alliance System
tasks.description: Enable up to 3 guilds to form an alliance, sharing a unified chat channel, combined leaderboard presence, and access to massive 50v50 multi-guild events.

tasks.title: Trickster Smoke Bomb
tasks.description: Trickster can drop a smoke bomb that creates a large fog zone, blinding enemies.

tasks.title: Shrink Ray Trap
tasks.description: Reduces the size and knockback resistance of the triggering ball temporarily, making them move faster but take much more knockback from attacks and collisions.

tasks.title: Sun God's Wrath Day Event
tasks.description: Similar to the Lunar Eclipse, randomly trigger a blinding solar flare event during the day that causes the arena walls to slowly close in and deals continuous minor burn damage to all players caught in the direct sunlight.

tasks.title: Shadow Form Booster
tasks.description: Add a new booster that temporarily grants players the Shadow form, increasing their speed and letting them steal HP from nearby enemies, but slowly draining their maximum stamina.

tasks.title: Shifting Gravity Fields
tasks.description: A mode where gravity periodically shifts in random directions.

tasks.title: Black Hole Core
tasks.description: A modifier where a stationary black hole sits in the center of the arena, dragging balls towards it continuously.

tasks.title: Wind Tunnels
tasks.description: Periodic powerful gusts of wind that push balls into obstacles or speed them up tremendously if they ride the tailwind.

tasks.title: Reflective Barriers
tasks.description: Barriers spawn in the arena that reflect projectiles and players at high speeds.

tasks.title: Shatter Mine
tasks.description: A deployable hazard that mimics a reflect shield visually but shatters immediately upon contact, stunning all nearby enemies without dealing damage.

tasks.title: Quantum Reflect
tasks.description: A new reflect shield variant that stores absorbed damage and converts it into healing over time for the user, rather than reflecting it back.

tasks.title: Weaponized Paint
tasks.description: A mode where players shoot paint that stays on the floor, providing a movement speed boost to allies and a slow debuff to enemies traversing over it.

tasks.title: Air Glider Booster
tasks.description: A booster item that grants temporary immunity to fall damage and hazard launch effects (like tornadoes), instead letting the ball gracefully glide over hazards with increased speed.

tasks.title: Airdrop Supply Packages
tasks.description: Periodically, high-value supply packages are dropped via parachute into the arena. They contain powerful one-time use items or strong temporary buffs, but their landing zone is telegraphed early, causing players to fight over the drop location.

tasks.title: Tornado Warning Siren Trap
tasks.description: A deployable trap that emits a localized siren. If an enemy ball enters the zone, a minor tornado spawns directly on them after 3 seconds, launching them out of the arena.

tasks.title: Weapon Durability and Overheat
tasks.description: Special weapons and abilities acquired from crates or drops have a durability or overheat mechanic. Players must manage their usage to avoid breaking the weapon or incurring a long cooldown, adding a layer of resource management to combat.

tasks.title: King of the Hill - Dynamic Capture Zones
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic capture zones that move around the arena. Teams earn points by staying inside the zone. If multiple teams are in the zone, points are contested. The zone shrinks over time, forcing closer combat.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Paths
tasks.description: Instead of bubbles, narrow snaking paths are the only safe zones. They slowly constrict and vanish while new ones appear.

tasks.title: Reverse Bubbles
tasks.description: The entire map is safe, but expanding hazard bubbles randomly spawn. Players must avoid the growing hazard zones.

tasks.title: Magnetic Mine Hazard
tasks.description: A new type of deployable hazard or natural arena element that slowly pulls all nearby projectiles (both friendly and enemy) towards its center. Upon absorbing a certain amount of damage, it explodes in a massive AoE blast.

tasks.title: Quantum Swap Power-up
tasks.description: A new booster that allows the player to swap places with the nearest enemy when they press the action button or automatically upon dropping to low HP. This causes confusion and can completely turn the tide of an engagement or save the player from being cornered.

tasks.title: Vote Streaks
tasks.description: If the crowd consistently votes for global stat modifiers over hazard drops, a 'crowd mood' bar shifts. Hitting max mood unlocks a mega-vote where all balls receive a randomized legendary buff for a brief duration, accompanied by special visual fireworks and audio cheers.

tasks.title: Bribe the Crowd
tasks.description: Players can use collected currency or sacrifice a portion of their max HP to bribe the crowd and artificially skew the vote towards a particular outcome, such as forcing a global heal if they are currently low on health.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zone Mod
tasks.description: A game mode where the safe area continuously shrinks over time, forcing players into closer proximity and increasing the frequency of encounters.

tasks.title: Vampiric Relic Aura
tasks.description: A cursed relic that drains the player's health over time but creates a large aura around them. Any enemies caught in the aura take damage, which heals the player for a fraction of the damage dealt.

tasks.title: Quantum Relic Modifier
tasks.description: A rare relic that causes the player to occasionally 'blink' a short distance in the direction they are moving, briefly becoming intangible, but lowering their max HP temporarily while held.

tasks.title: Hovercraft Mode
tasks.description: Friction is reduced to zero, making all balls slide uncontrollably until they hit a wall or use a dash ability.

tasks.title: Bouncy Arena Walls
tasks.description: Players hitting the arena boundaries are bounced back at double speed, adding a chaotic pinball element to the game.

tasks.title: Reflective Walls
tasks.description: Certain walls bounce projectiles back perfectly, creating more geometry puzzles for aiming.

tasks.title: Battering Ram Booster
tasks.description: A booster that temporarily gives any ball the ability to instantly break walls if traveling fast enough.

tasks.title: Shrinking Modifiers Battle Royale
tasks.description: A battle royale mode where random modifiers (like double speed or zero gravity) trigger every 60 seconds, forcing players to adapt dynamically.

tasks.title: Gravity Inversion Mode
tasks.description: Periodically, gravity flips, pulling players to the walls instead of the ground or sending them flying.

tasks.title: Ghost Companion
tasks.description: Eliminated players spawn as ghosts that can attach to living players, applying small buffs or debuffs.

tasks.title: Sticky Mine
tasks.description: A deployable hazard that sticks to the first ball that approaches it, ticking down before exploding. Passing close to another ball transfers the mine.

tasks.title: Double Juggernaut Mode
tasks.description: Two players spawn as Juggernauts. When one is killed, they drop a massive heal, but the remaining Juggernaut gets an enrage buff.

tasks.title: Juggernaut Roulette Mode
tasks.description: Every 30 seconds, a new player is randomly selected as the Juggernaut regardless of who killed them, shifting alliances dynamically.

tasks.title: Portal Bounce Challenge
tasks.description: Portals spawn on the map that reflect projectiles and players based on velocity and incidence angle, turning the arena into a bouncy chaos.

tasks.title: King of the Hill Escalation
tasks.description: A single control point grants increasing global buffs to the controlling player's faction, but they take exponentially more damage the longer they hold it.

tasks.title: Leech Seed Trap
tasks.description: A new trap type that acts as a leech seed, attaching to the first ball that passes over it and slowly draining their HP while transferring the health to the ball that deployed the trap.

tasks.title: Vampiric Arena Mutator
tasks.description: A mutator where all balls passively lose health over time, but gain a massive lifesteal boost. It forces aggressive gameplay as hiding will result in death.

tasks.title: Capture the Flag Elements in Battle Royale
tasks.description: Spawn flags in neutral capture zones. If a player captures the flag and brings it to the center zone, they gain massive stat boosts for the duration of the match.

tasks.title: Mercenary Outposts
tasks.description: Players can capture mercenary outposts across the map. Once fully captured, friendly AI balls spawn periodically and help defend the capturing player.

tasks.title: Guild Headquarters Music Player
tasks.description: Allow guilds to spend their Guild XP on unlocking different ambient background music tracks for their HQ, allowing members to personalize the vibe of their headquarters lobby.

tasks.title: Headquarters Interactive Pets
tasks.description: Introduce interactive AI pets that roam around the guild headquarters. Guilds can purchase them with Guild XP and members can interact with them (petting or feeding them) for small temporary luck buffs.

tasks.title: Quantum Swap Powerup
tasks.description: A powerup that targets a random enemy within a certain radius. When collected, the player instantly swaps positions with that enemy, gaining a brief moment of invulnerability while disorienting the opponent.

tasks.title: Boomerang Projectile
tasks.description: A new skill where the player throws a projectile that deals damage on its way out, pauses, and then returns to the player. It can hit enemies twice (outgoing and returning).

tasks.title: Shrinking Shrapnel Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where shrapnel hazards progressively split into smaller, faster projectiles over time, eventually dissolving into a fine mist that slightly obscures vision.

tasks.title: Laser Fence Mode
tasks.description: Hazard lines periodically spawn and move across the arena, damaging anyone caught.

tasks.title: Jumper Booster
tasks.description: A booster that gives the user temporary invulnerability to ground hazards like ticking bombs.

tasks.title: Gravity Boots Active Item
tasks.description: An active item that players can pick up and activate to individually reverse their own gravity for a short time. Useful for dodging floor-based hazards like lava or spikes, or escaping a dense group of enemies.

tasks.title: Shared Health Pool Mode
tasks.description: Teams share a single massive health pool. Taking damage drains from the collective pool. When it reaches 0, the entire team is eliminated simultaneously. Promotes extreme teamwork and protective strategies.

tasks.title: Reverse Time Penalty Mode
tasks.description: Every 60 seconds, all balls are forcefully rewound to their positions 10 seconds ago. However, their health and cooldowns remain at current levels, leading to unpredictable resets and repositioning plays.

tasks.title: Sticky Ceilings Modifier
tasks.description: An environmental hazard mutator where certain areas of the ceiling become extremely sticky during reverse gravity events, slowing down any ball that gets stuck to them and requiring a dash or explosive knockback to break free.

tasks.title: Quantum Swap Bomb
tasks.description: A new deployable hazard that arms after 2 seconds. When triggered, it swaps the positions of the closest ally and the closest enemy within a massive radius, potentially throwing an enemy into a hazard while pulling an ally to safety.

tasks.title: Clan Emissary System
tasks.description: Allow clan leaders to designate 'Emissaries'. In Battle Royale modes, if an Emissary survives to the top 3, they claim bonus territory points or resources for their clan. This paints a target on their back during matches, creating emergent 'bounty' gameplay dynamics where other players can earn rewards for eliminating an Emissary.

tasks.title: Dynamic Map Hazards Based on Territory Ownership
tasks.description: If a clan owns a specific territory, not only do they get passive bonuses, but the map itself alters to favor them. For instance, specific environmental hazards like lava geysers or poison traps could become 'friendly' to the controlling clan (not damaging their members) while remaining dangerous to rival clans or unaligned players.

tasks.title: Tag Team Arena
tasks.description: Players can swap places with a partner at will but share a cooldown on the ability.

tasks.title: Bouncy Castle Mode
tasks.description: The arena is super bouncy and balls bounce higher and further when hitting edges.

tasks.title: Nemesis Tractor Beam
tasks.description: An activated ability that slowly pulls your Nemesis towards you while slowing them down.

tasks.title: Nemesis Shield Booster
tasks.description: A booster that gives the player a shield only against damage taken from their Nemesis.

tasks.title: Clan Emissary Quests
tasks.description: Introduces a new NPC in the main menu called the 'Clan Emissary'. Players can talk to the emissary to receive weekly clan-specific quests (e.g., 'Have 5 clan members achieve a triple kill'). Completing these quests rewards unique 'Emissary Tokens' that can be spent in an exclusive shop for clan-themed items like banners, icons, or temporary stat boosters for the whole clan.

tasks.title: Mirror Illusion Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where every ball has a harmless mirror illusion on the opposite side of the arena that moves symmetrically, confusing opponents and absorbing single-target projectiles.

tasks.title: Guild Wars Base Building
tasks.description: Allow guilds to customize their 'HQ' visually and mechanically. Add a 'Guild War' game mode where guilds build defenses (turrets, walls, traps) using their resources, and other guilds can attack their HQ asynchronously or synchronously. This gives more utility to guild resources and territories.

tasks.title: Dynamic Weather Mutators
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic weather systems (e.g., thunderstorms, blizzards, sandstorms) that rotate during matches and affect gameplay. Thunderstorms could periodically strike random locations with lightning, blizzards could slow movement speed globally, and sandstorms could reduce perception radius for all AI.

tasks.title: Laser Grid Survival Mode
tasks.description: An intense game mode where a grid of static lasers slowly moves across the arena, forcing players to find safe pockets and navigate the grid while fighting enemies.

tasks.title: Mirror Laser Shield Trait
tasks.description: A new ball trait that absorbs damage from laser hazards and uses it to charge up a devastating focused laser beam attack of its own.

tasks.title: Echo Strike Passive
tasks.description: A passive ability that causes every third basic attack to echo, dealing an additional 50% damage in a small area of effect around the target, adding a rhythm-based combo mechanic to combat.

tasks.title: Black Hole Anomaly
tasks.description: Periodically, a massive gravity well appears that sucks in projecticles and items, changing weapon trajectories and creating a dangerous pull effect.

tasks.title: Ricochet Mode
tasks.description: All projectiles bounce off walls infinitely until they hit a target or their duration expires, making positioning extremely important.

tasks.title: Time Loop Trap
tasks.description: A trap that records the triggering ball's position and HP over 3 seconds. After 3 seconds, the ball is teleported back to its recorded position and its HP is restored to what it was, essentially 'rewinding' them.

tasks.title: Blackout Ghost Mode
tasks.description: The arena is completely pitch black. Balls only become briefly visible when they bounce off walls, take damage, or attack. Attacks are skill shots that temporarily illuminate a small area.

tasks.title: Necromantic Area Denial
tasks.description: A new skill that turns dead enemy remains into volatile poison clouds. The clouds expand over time before detonating, creating strategic choke points.

tasks.title: Neon Lightcycles Mode
tasks.description: Balls cannot stop moving and leave a permanent solid light trail behind them. Crossing any trail (including your own) instantly eliminates the ball. The last ball remaining wins.

tasks.title: Quantum Leap Traps
tasks.description: Placeable traps that don't deal damage but randomly teleport the victim across the arena while simultaneously scrambling their controls for a few seconds.

tasks.title: Kinetic Reversal Zone
tasks.description: A special arena hazard zone that acts like a mirror to momentum. Any entity entering the zone immediately has their velocity vectors flipped by 180 degrees, bouncing them directly backward without applying any damage. Great for defensive placements.

tasks.title: Shrinking Juggernaut Mode
tasks.description: Similar to Juggernaut mode, but the Juggernaut's stats slowly decay over time, pushing players to stay aggressive and preventing endless stalling.

tasks.title: Echolocation Only Mode
tasks.description: Players cannot see the arena except for a tiny radius. Every few seconds, players emit a sound pulse that reveals enemies and walls momentarily.

tasks.title: Bouncing Laser Core
tasks.description: A single indestructible laser core spawns in the center of the map. It fires two continuous solid beam lasers in opposite directions and slowly rotates. Over time, the core bounces around the arena like a paddle ball, randomly changing direction when hitting a wall, making dodging extremely unpredictable.

tasks.title: Revival Disruption Aura
tasks.description: During the reviving process, the downed player emits an aura that slightly slows down enemies or disrupts their abilities, providing a small tactical window of safety for the active player trying to pull off the revive.

tasks.title: Magnet Ball Modifier
tasks.description: An arena hazard that occasionally magnetizes players with positive or negative charges. Opposite charges attract and same charges repel, forcing players to navigate unpredictable physics when fighting near each other.

tasks.title: Shrink Ray Arena
tasks.description: A game mode where lasers sweep the arena. Any ball hit by a laser permanently shrinks by 10% and loses max HP, but gains speed. Getting hit too many times turns you into a tiny fragile speedster.

tasks.title: Downed Bleed-out Timer
tasks.description: When a player is downed in Tag Team mode, instead of staying downed indefinitely, they should slowly bleed out (lose max HP) over time until they are fully eliminated. This would force the active player to attempt a revive quickly instead of stalling the game.

tasks.title: Idea 1: Solar Flare Mode
tasks.description: Occasionally a solar flare strikes the arena, disabling all electronics (e.g. traps, drone hazards) and temporarily shrinking perception radius.

tasks.title: Sniper's Nest Deployable
tasks.description: An item that players can drop to create a small zone. Any ball inside the zone gains a massive boost to bullet velocity and attack range, but takes double damage from incoming attacks.

tasks.title: Acoustic Disruption Field
tasks.description: A new hazard that temporarily disables the 'perception_radius' of any ball inside it, rendering them effectively blind and unable to target enemies, but still able to move freely.

tasks.title: Idea 2: Gravity Pulse Mine
tasks.description: A rare drop hazard that periodically pulsates, pushing away enemies in a large radius but pulling in allies.

tasks.title: Tag Team Ultimate Synergy Mode
tasks.description: If tag team partners swap continuously without breaking their combo chains, they unlock a shared ultimate ability that merges their traits for 10 seconds, creating an ultra-ball.

tasks.title: Assisting Spectator Actions
tasks.description: Allow the inactive, spectator tag team partner to briefly drop small hazard traps or boosters for their active teammate, adding an interactive dimension to being sidelined.

tasks.title: Shockwave Mine
tasks.description: A new trap variant that deals zero damage but applies an enormous outward physics knockback in a massive area when detonated. Great for tossing opponents into hazards like poison clouds or spike walls.

tasks.title: Black Market Auction Event
tasks.description: A mid-game event where players can wager their collected loadout fragments in a fast-paced blind auction to secure ultra-rare, game-changing booster items or exclusive cosmetics.

tasks.title: Pinball Bumper Mutator
tasks.description: A game mode mutator where colliding with any other ball automatically arms a Stun Explosion on both entities, creating an arena filled with constant bouncing and cascading stun effects.

tasks.title: Decoy Trail Mode
tasks.description: Players periodically leave behind a trail of decoys that inherit their current appearance and velocity for a short duration, confusing opponents in high-speed chases.

tasks.title: Sticky Floor Hazard
tasks.description: Certain areas of the map act as sticky floors that slowly reduce movement speed over time while a player remains on them, but drastically increase traction/defense against pushing.

tasks.title: Mirror Image Decoy Booster
tasks.description: A booster that, when picked up, spawns two intangible clones of the ball that move in mirrored paths from the original ball. They don't do damage, but confuse enemies and disappear after 5 seconds or upon taking damage.

tasks.title: Mirror Arenas
tasks.description: Certain walls bounce projectiles back perfectly and sometimes duplicate them to double the chaos.

tasks.title: Quantum Tunneling Skill
tasks.description: A new skill that allows the ball to instantly teleport through a wall or hazard if they are right next to it. They become intangible for 0.5s after tunneling to ensure they don't get stuck, and the skill goes on a 15-second cooldown.

tasks.title: Reverse Time Zone
tasks.description: A battle royale where being outside the safe zone doesn't deal damage, but instead continuously reverses the player's position back in time, trapping them in the storm forever.

tasks.title: Bouncing Bullets Mode
tasks.description: All projectiles fired by players bounce off walls infinitely until they hit a player or lose all their velocity.

tasks.title: Gravity Inverter Zone
tasks.description: A specific zone in the arena where the effects of gravity and knockbacks are completely reversed for all entities inside.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Boots
tasks.description: A new cosmetic boot loadout that links the player's movement and knockback taken with the nearest ally. When the player receives knockback, the force is halved and the other half is applied to the linked ally in the same direction, allowing them to reposition together during chaotic team fights. Also shares positive status effect durations between them.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Relay
tasks.description: A new hazard or deployable item that acts as a chain lightning relay. When struck by chain lightning (or any electrical effect), it amplifies the damage by 50% and extends the maximum chain jumps by 2, before passing it on to the next targets in range. It also absorbs nearby small electrical attacks to charge up a massive AoE burst.

tasks.title: Gravity Swap Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard zone that reverses the controls and gravity effects of anyone who enters it for a few seconds.

tasks.title: Toxic Sludge Mutator
tasks.description: A new mutator for custom matches where all ground hazards (like lava and spikes) are replaced with toxic sludge. Toxic sludge applies the Radiation debuff for 10 seconds, drastically increasing damage taken from all sources, and slows movement speed. Forces players to heavily prioritize area control.

tasks.title: Unstable Payload Event
tasks.description: Periodically, an 'unstable payload' hazard spawns in the center of the arena. It slowly expands and deals increasing radiation damage. Players must attack it to push it towards enemy teams before it reaches critical mass and detonates, instantly eliminating anyone caught in its massive blast radius.

tasks.title: Kinetic Energy Battery Mode
tasks.description: A mode where balls don't do damage directly. Instead, moving fast and bouncing off walls charges up their personal kinetic battery. Once fully charged, they can unleash a massive, instantaneous shockwave that damages all nearby enemies.

tasks.title: Decoy Mimic Transposition
tasks.description: A new trickster skill that allows players to instantly swap places with an active mimic clone, transferring all of the player's momentum and current status effects to the clone while leaving the player safely behind at the clone's previous position.

tasks.title: Turret Overdrive Protocol
tasks.description: An alternate engineer skill that temporarily boosts the fire rate and damage of all deployed turrets by 50% for 10 seconds, but causes them to explode at the end of the duration.

tasks.title: Unstable Decoy Overload
tasks.description: If a decoy clone is hit by a lightning strike event or a static shock booster, it becomes overcharged, increasing its explosion radius and confusing enemies hit for a significantly longer duration before detonating.

tasks.title: Mobile Turret Platform
tasks.description: A new hazard that acts as a mobile platform. Any turret deployed on it will move around the arena along a predefined path, giving the Engineer a moving defensive point.

tasks.title: Gravity Inverter
tasks.description: A consumable item that inverts gravity in an area.

tasks.title: Unstable Artifact Event
tasks.description: An artifact spawns that gives a massive power boost to whoever holds it, but completely randomizes their abilities and ball type every 10 seconds.

tasks.title: Quantum Doppelgänger Event
tasks.description: Using a quantum teleporter has a small chance to spawn an aggressive clone of the player at the exit point that mirrors their stats and attacks them.

tasks.title: Slingshot Nodes
tasks.description: Similar to grapple nodes, slingshot nodes can be attached to but instead of pulling the player towards them, they charge up tension and then launch the player in the opposite direction at extreme speed. They break after one use and drop unique 'Elastic Cord' materials.

tasks.title: Grapple Mines
tasks.description: Traps that look like grapple nodes but pull players in and explode on contact. They can be disarmed by hitting them with a projectile from afar, which makes them drop explosive materials instead.

tasks.title: Chain Reaction Decoy
tasks.description: A new skill that deploys a special decoy that links to nearby enemies with tethers. When the decoy explodes or takes enough damage, it transfers a portion of the damage back to all linked enemies.

tasks.title: Quantum Instability Field
tasks.description: A hazard that periodically applies randomized stat modifications to all entities inside it.

tasks.title: Decoy Bodyguard
tasks.description: An active ability that summons a beefy decoy that doesn't just sit there, but actively orbits the player. Any incoming projectiles hitting the decoy are absorbed, but if it takes too much damage it detonates, stunning nearby enemies.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zone With Damage Multiplier
tasks.description: Like a standard safe zone, but instead of straight damage out of bounds, the further out you are, the higher the damage multiplier gets when hit by enemies.

tasks.title: Orbital Mine Sweeper Power-up
tasks.description: A new temporary power-up that makes the collecting ball immune to orbital mine damage and allows them to collect orbital mines as ammo or buffs instead.

tasks.title: Black Hole Overload
tasks.description: A new mutator where Black Holes periodically pulse, dealing damage and pushing balls away instead of pulling.

tasks.title: Ammunition Scavenge Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where default attack speed and damage are vastly reduced. Players must rely on picking up temporary 'ammunition' items spawned randomly to unleash high-damage combos.

tasks.title: Teleporting Safe Zone Mode
tasks.description: The safe zone does not slowly move; instead, it instantly teleports to a random location every minute, forcing players to scramble across the dangerous zone quickly to find it.

tasks.title: False Maze Walls
tasks.description: Some maze walls look identical to regular walls but are completely breakable with a single dash attack, rewarding players who experiment and enabling sneaky ambushes.

tasks.title: Shrinking Bouncy Arena Mode
tasks.description: Combines Extreme Bounciness with a shrinking safe zone. As the walls close in, the bouncing intensity increases, forcing players into frantic, close-quarters pinball scenarios.

tasks.title: Bouncy Bullet Hell Mode
tasks.description: Projectiles inherit the extreme bounciness physics, turning the arena into a chaotic bullet hell where missed shots rapidly ricochet off walls, growing in speed until they hit something.

tasks.title: Bumper Frenzy Mode
tasks.description: A new mode where bumpers spawn randomly all over the arena. Balls that bounce off them gain an additive speed multiplier, creating chaotic ultra-fast matches. Touching a wall while moving at max speed shatters the wall.

tasks.title: Bumper Shield Integration
tasks.description: If a player collects a bumper synergy booster while also having an active kinetic shield, the shield converts bumper impact energy into bonus shield capacity instead of speed boosts, turning them into a heavily armored juggernaut.

tasks.title: Chain Reaction Mayhem
tasks.description: Every player defeated unleashes a massive explosion that can trigger other players' explosions, leading to catastrophic chain reactions.

tasks.title: Laser Grid Arena
tasks.description: A mode where random intersecting lasers continuously activate across the arena, forcing players to perfectly time their movements.

tasks.title: Waterfalls (Vertical Currents)
tasks.description: Introduce a Waterfall hazard that operates similarly to flood zones but dynamically changes the elevation level of the arena, dropping entities to a lower arena layer where different hazards might exist. While falling, entities cannot attack but can be attacked.

tasks.title: Earthquake Event
tasks.description: A random arena event that randomly shifts hazard positions and adds small random velocity impulses to all balls for a short duration.

tasks.title: Hazard Traps
tasks.description: Players can pick up 'Hazard Jars' to store environmental hazards like acid puddles or neutralizing puddles, and deploy them strategically to create chokepoints or safe zones for their team.

tasks.title: Weather Mastery Trait
tasks.description: A new trait 'Weather Mastery' that grants a 20% speed and defense bonus when standing in extreme weather events or specific hazards, converting environmental danger into an advantage.

tasks.title: Holo-Decoy Ball
tasks.description: A consumable item that drops a visually identical hologram of the player's ball that travels in a straight line at maximum speed to confuse enemies and draw sniper fire or homing attacks.

tasks.title: Black Hole Decoy
tasks.description: Introduce a new decoy type called the 'Black Hole Decoy'. When it detonates, instead of dealing immediate damage or crowd control, it creates a gravitational singularity that pulls in all nearby entities (balls, projectiles, items) for 3 seconds before collapsing and dealing damage based on the total mass/entities absorbed.

tasks.title: Bumper Car Demolition
tasks.description: Every ball is equipped with high-impact bumpers. Normal attacks are disabled. Players can only damage others by ramming into them at high speeds. The arena gradually shrinks, increasing the frequency and intensity of collisions.

tasks.title: Decoy Resonance Chain
tasks.description: If three or more decoys (of any type) detonate simultaneously near each other, they create a massive 'Resonance Chain' explosion. This explosion deals true damage ignoring armor, pulls all enemies within a massive radius toward the center, and permanently leaves a small scorched earth zone that deals minor damage over time to anyone walking on it.

tasks.title: Wormhole network
tasks.description: Black holes periodically form a network to transport balls.

tasks.title: Cosmic string
tasks.description: A line of intense gravity pulls balls along a specific path.

tasks.title: Random Supply Drops
tasks.description: Periodically drop powerful, game-changing items from the sky. The drop location is broadcasted in advance, creating a hotspot for skirmishes.

tasks.title: Supernova Powerup
tasks.description: A rare drop that causes the collecting ball to explode upon receiving fatal damage instead of dying immediately. The explosion damages and knocks back all nearby balls, and the player is resurrected with 1 HP and brief invulnerability.

tasks.title: EMP Decoy
tasks.description: When destroyed, this decoy disables all skills of nearby enemies for a few seconds.

tasks.title: Cryogenic Ammo
tasks.description: A booster that imbues a ball's attacks with cryogenic properties for a limited time, causing any target hit to leave behind temporary small ice patches where they walk.

tasks.title: Thermal Jetpack Booster
tasks.description: A new booster that grants temporary flight, ignoring ground friction, ground traps, and knockback effects for a short duration while significantly boosting movement speed.

tasks.title: Quantum Swap Grenade
tasks.description: A throwable grenade that upon detonation instantly swaps the positions of the thrower and the closest enemy caught in its blast radius. If no enemy is hit, it just deals minor area damage.

tasks.title: Black Hole Collapser
tasks.description: A hazard that slowly pulls entities toward its center. When it expires, it violently explodes, pushing everyone away.

tasks.title: Gravity Swap Pad
tasks.description: A hazard pad that reverses the effect of gravity for any ball that touches it for 3 seconds.
